title: Economy of Minds: Emerging Multi-Agent Intelligence with Economic Interactions
summary: How can a population of agents self-orchestrate and self-adapt into stronger collective intelligence without centralized control? Inspired by Friedrich Hayek's economic theory of decentralized coordination in markets, we study this question through an agent economy in which agents compete via auctions for the right to act, exchange payments, and accumulate wealth from environmental rewards. These simple economic signals induce decentralized credit assignment, driving planning without global orchestration or explicit communication protocols. The population evolves through economic selection: effective agents accumulate wealth and are mutated via exploitation, while ineffective ones go bankrupt and are replaced via exploration. We show that, initialized with weak agents, the economy produces emergent multi-step reasoning strategies and outperforms stronger monolithic baselines across five agentic tasks, including mathematical reasoning, financial research, scientific research, accelerator design, and distributed-system optimization. We further provide theoretical insights into how economic dynamics shape agent behaviors, linking local incentives to long-term global performance. Our results suggest a new path to multi-agent intelligence: rather than engineering coordination, we can design decentralized incentive structures under which it automatically emerges.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种受哈耶克市场理论启发的去中心化智能体经济系统，通过拍卖、支付和财富积累等经济信号实现无需集中控制的分布式信用分配与自动涌现的多步推理策略，在五个智能体任务上超越强单体基线。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体系统通常依赖集中式协调或显式通信协议来组织群体行为，但如何在无集中控制条件下让智能体群体自发形成更强的集体智能仍是一个开放问题。本文受哈耶克关于市场中去中心化协调的经济理论启发，旨在探索能否通过设计去中心化的激励结构而非显式工程化协调来让智能体自动涌现出协作与推理能力。
AI.method: 提出了一种智能体经济机制：多个智能体通过拍卖竞争行动权，进行支付交换并从环境奖励中积累财富。经济信号（财富积累与消减）充当去中心化的信用分配信号，驱动无需全局编排或显式通信的规划过程。群体演化通过经济选择实现——富有效率的智能体积累财富并通过利用（exploitation）产生变异，而效率低下的智能体破产后通过探索（exploration）被替换，从而在无中心化控制下实现群体的自组织与自适应。
AI.result: 从弱智能体初始化出发，该经济系统在数学推理、金融研究、科学研究、加速器设计和分布式系统优化五个智能体任务上均自动涌现出多步推理策略，且性能超越更强的单体基线模型。实验表明经济动力学能够有效将局部激励与长期全局性能关联起来，证明了去中心化经济选择机制能够产生超越显式协调方法的集体智能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一条通往多智能体智能的新路径：通过设计去中心化的激励结构而非显式协调协议，可以自发地涌现协作与推理能力。文中提供了关于经济动力学如何塑造智能体行为的理论见解，将局部激励与长期全局表现联系起来，表明市场机制可以在多智能体系统中有效替代集中式控制范式。

title: Adaptive Latent Agentic Reasoning
summary: Large reasoning models improve performance by generating extended chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, but this behavior becomes inefficient when applied to LLM agents. Current LLM agents often generate verbose textual reasoning at every decision step and allocate reasoning effort nearly uniformly across turns, leading to substantial inefficiency in multi-turn agentic trajectories. We propose Adaptive Latent Agentic Reasoning (ALAR), a dual-mode framework that uses compact latent reasoning for routine turns and selectively escalates to explicit chain-of-thought when deeper deliberation is needed. ALAR learns latent reasoning by using the agent's actions as supervision anchors and is further optimized to use latent reasoning when it is sufficient for task success and reserve explicit CoT for harder decisions. Experiments on agentic search and tool-use benchmarks show that ALAR maintains comparable or better task accuracy while substantially reducing generated tokens by up to 43.6% in search and 84.6% in tool use. These results demonstrate that ALAR improves the accuracy-efficiency trade-off of LLM agents by reducing unnecessary textual reasoning while preserving explicit deliberation for harder decision steps.

AI.tldr: ALAR提出了一种双模式框架，利用紧凑的潜在推理处理常规决策步骤，仅在需要深度推理时切换为显式思维链，在保持任务准确率的同时显著减少了生成token数量（搜索任务减少43.6%，工具使用任务减少84.6%），从而改善了LLM智能体的准确率-效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM智能体在每一步决策时都会生成长文本链式推理，且推理努力在回合间近乎均匀分配，导致在多轮交互轨迹中产生大量不必要的计算开销和token浪费，缺乏根据任务难度自适应分配推理资源的机制。
AI.method: ALAR采用双模式框架：对于常规决策步骤使用紧凑的潜在推理（latent reasoning），通过智能体的动作作为监督锚点来学习潜在表征；仅在需要更深层次思考时选择性升级为显式思维链（CoT）。该框架通过优化策略确保潜在推理足以完成任务时优先使用，将显式CoT保留给更困难的决策步骤。
AI.result: 在智能体搜索和工具使用基准测试中，ALAR在保持与基线相当或更优任务准确率的同时，在搜索任务上减少了高达43.6%的生成token，在工具使用任务上减少了高达84.6%的生成token。
AI.conclusion: ALAR通过减少不必要的文本推理并保留显式推理用于困难决策步骤，有效改善了LLM智能体的准确率-效率权衡，表明自适应推理资源分配是提升智能体效率的关键方向。

title: EURO-5K: When Does Domain Pretraining Matter? Benchmarking Transformers for EU Reporting Obligation Extraction
summary: Extracting reporting obligations from EU legislation is critical for assessing and reducing regulatory reporting burden. However, distinguishing reporting requirements from structurally similar provisions requires specialised legal understanding. Current legal NLP methods lack specialised datasets with clear guidelines and comparative evaluation of extraction paradigms and domain adaptation strategies. We curate EURO-5K, a corpus of sentence-level reporting obligations and challenging negative examples from 136 EU legislative acts. On this dataset, we train and compare discriminative token-classification models (BERT-style) and generative span-extraction models (LLMs), evaluating both full fine-tuning and parameter-efficient QLoRA against baselines (pattern and dependency-based extraction, few-shot prompting). Results show that fully fine-tuned generic and legal BERT models achieve similar performance (0.89 F1), while fine-tuned LLMs match encoder accuracy for sentence-level extraction. Legal pretraining offers only small gains for generative models. In contrast, it is clearly beneficial when adaptation capacity is constrained, as parameter-efficient tuning of Legal-BERT outperforms its generic counterpart. Learning curve analysis demonstrates that legal pretraining accelerates early learning with minimal data. All approaches converge around 3K samples with diminishing returns thereafter, validating dataset sufficiency. Cross-dataset evaluation on two external regulatory corpora shows that our models behave as specialised reporting obligation extractors rather than generic regulatory classifiers. We release EURO-5K, trained models, and an interactive demo with explainability visualizations and structured RDF export. These demonstrate that both paradigms and parameter-efficient training provide practical tools for regulatory compliance automation.

AI.tldr: 提出EURO-5K数据集和基准实验，证明全微调BERT与LLM在句子级报告义务抽取上性能相当（0.89 F1），法律预训练在参数高效微调下收益显著，并验证3K样本即可达到性能饱和。
AI.motivation: 从欧盟立法中提取报告义务对评估和减少监管报告负担至关重要，但区分报告要求与结构相似的规定需要专业的法律理解。当前法律NLP方法缺乏带有明确标注指南的数据集，也缺少对提取范式和领域适配策略的系统比较评估。
AI.method: 构建EURO-5K语料库，包含136部欧盟法律文本的句子级报告义务标注及挑战性负例。在此基础上系统比较了判别式标记分类模型（BERT类）与生成式跨度提取模型（LLM），评估了全微调与参数高效QLoRA两种适配策略，并与基于规则/依赖的提取和少样本提示基线进行对比。
AI.result: 全微调的通用与法律BERT模型性能相近（0.89 F1），微调LLM在句子级提取上达到与编码器相当的准确率。法律预训练对生成模型增益有限，但在参数高效微调下（QLoRA）Legal-BERT显著优于通用BERT。学习曲线表明法律预训练加速了小样本下的早期学习，所有方法约在3K样本处收敛，此后收益递减。跨数据集评估验证了模型作为专门报告义务抽取器的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 判别式与生成式两种范式及参数高效训练均能为监管合规自动化提供实用工具。法律领域预训练在数据受限场景下价值尤为突出。研究发布了EURO-5K数据集、训练模型及交互式演示工具，支持可解释性可视化与结构化RDF导出。

title: A Locally Deployed RAG-Based Academic Advising System for Course Selection
comment: to be published in Elsevier's Procedia Computer. Sci. (KES 2026)
summary: The correct sequence of courses in the curriculum based on prerequisites between courses is of great importance for students to develop their knowledge and skills holistically. However, students crafting this sequence in isolation frequently struggle with recognition limitations and information overload that leads to confusion. Simultaneously, education institutions encounter difficulties in providing adequate academic advice for the correct sequence due to limited education resources. To address these challenges, we propose a locally deployed RAG-based academic advising system grounded in syllabus information. By combining large language models with retrieval from structured syllabus data, the system is designed to support course selection, prerequisite understanding, and personalized study planning in a privacy-preserving manner.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于RAG（检索增强生成）的本地化学术咨询系统，利用大语言模型和结构化课程大纲数据，在保护隐私的前提下为学生提供课程选择、先修课程理解和个性化学习规划支持。
AI.motivation: 学生自行规划课程顺序时常因认知局限和信息过载而产生困惑，而教育机构由于资源有限难以提供充分的学术咨询，亟需一种能自动、准确且保护隐私的课程顺序建议系统。
AI.method: 提出一种本地部署的RAG（检索增强生成）学术咨询系统，将大语言模型与结构化课程大纲数据的检索相结合，支持课程选择、先修课程理解和个性化学习规划，并确保隐私安全。
AI.result: 文中未给出具体的实验指标或定量结果，仅描述了系统的设计思路与预期功能，尚缺乏实际部署或基准测试的性能数据。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了将RAG与LLM结合用于学术咨询的可行方向，强调了在资源受限环境下通过本地化部署实现隐私保护的学术支持价值，但需要后续实验验证其有效性和实用性。

title: Consistent Yet Wrong: Evidence Insensitivity in Spatial Vision-Language Models

AI.tldr: 本文发现现代视觉语言模型（VLM）在空间距离推理中呈现“一致但错误”的反常现象：模型在不同视角下给出稳定一致的预测，但这些预测却是错误的，表明跨视角一致性不能作为几何理解的代理指标。为此，作者提出ViewDiag评估协议，从度量精度、分布集中度和特征坍缩三大维度系统诊断VLM的空间推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究常假设视觉语言模型（VLM）在空间距离查询中跨视角预测的一致性反映了其几何推理能力，但这一假设缺乏验证。本文旨在检验该假设是否成立，并揭示模型在空间推理中可能存在的虚假稳定性问题。
AI.method: 作者提出了ViewDiag，一个基于Hypersim、ScanNet和KITTI360构建的多视角受控评估协议，包含80个场景中176个对象对的2–10个视角轨迹。评估从三个维度展开：度量精度（metric accuracy）、分布集中度（distributional concentration）以及通过潜在特征探针（latent feature probe）区分决策坍缩（decision collapse）与表示坍缩（representation collapse）的内部坍缩分析。
AI.result: 实验发现，多种VLM均表现出高度预测稳定性伴随显著误差的一致模式，模型预测聚集在“高一致性但低精度”的状态区间。此外，模型在错误答案上同样展现出视角不变性，表明预测与视角相关的视觉证据之间耦合薄弱。
AI.conclusion: 跨视角一致性不能作为几何理解的可靠代理指标，稳定的预测可能反映的是先验驱动的坍缩（prior-driven collapse）而非基于证据的推理。ViewDiag为超越纯精度的空间VLM评估提供了受控基准和诊断框架。

title: Traj-Evolve: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent System for Patient Trajectory Modeling in Lung Cancer Early Detection
summary: Modeling patient trajectories from longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs) requires reasoning over sparse, noisy, and long-context multimodal sequences. Existing LLM-based multi-agent systems address context length but process patients in isolation, failing to mirror how clinicians leverage accumulated experience from similar prior cases. We present Traj-Evolve, a self-evolving multi-agent system with two complementary evolving mechanisms. First, an Experience Pool (ExPool) acts as a non-parametric memory, indexing rejection-sampled reasoning traces to retrieve similar patients as few-shot contexts. Second, multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) via reward-ranked fine-tuning parametrically optimizes inter-agent and agent-memory collaboration. A leave-one-out cross-retrieval strategy unifies the two, aligning training- and inference-time behavior under retrieval augmentation. On a lung cancer prediction task utilizing up to five years of multimodal EHRs, Traj-Evolve outperforms 9 strong baselines on the overall population and a challenging never-smoker population. Analysis of the evolving dynamics highlights three key findings: (1) expanding the ExPool shifts optimal retrieval from diverse to specific samples; (2) under MARL, the manager agent's prediction loss converges quickly while the worker agents' temporal reasoning continues to benefit from more verified patients; and (3) the two mechanisms are complementary on the predicted risk, where ExPool improves specificity while MARL improves sensitivity.

AI.tldr: Traj-Evolve提出了一种自演化的多智能体系统，通过经验池（ExPool）的非参数记忆和基于多智能体强化学习（MARL）的参数化优化两种互补演化机制，在长序列多模态EHR轨迹预测中显著优于现有方法，并揭示了检索多样性、智能体协作与风险预测敏感性和特异性之间的演化规律。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统虽能处理长上下文EHR序列，但每个患者的推理过程相互独立，无法像临床医生那样从相似既往病例中积累经验，缺乏跨病例的知识迁移与协作演化机制。
AI.method: Traj-Evolve包含两种互补的演化机制：一是经验池（ExPool），作为非参数记忆存储经拒绝采样的推理轨迹，通过检索相似患者提供少样本上下文；二是基于奖励排序微调的多智能体强化学习（MARL），参数化地优化智能体间及智能体与记忆之间的协作。此外，采用留一法交叉检索策略统一训练与推理时的检索增强行为。
AI.result: 在基于长达五年多模态EHR的肺癌预测任务上，Traj-Evolve在总体人群和具有挑战性的从不吸烟人群上均优于9个强基线模型。分析表明：(1) 扩展ExPool使最优检索从多样样本转向特定样本；(2) MARL中管理者智能体的预测损失快速收敛，而工作者智能体的时序推理持续从更多已验证患者中受益；(3) 两种机制互补：ExPool提升特异性，MARL提升敏感性。
AI.conclusion: Traj-Evolve验证了通过非参数记忆与参数化强化学习协同演化可显著提升多智能体系统在长序列EHR建模中的表现，并揭示了检索策略、智能体分工与风险预测性能之间的演化规律，为临床决策中的经验积累式推理提供了新的范式。

title: The Deliberative Illusion: Diagnosing Factual Attrition and Stance Homogenization in Multi-Agent LLM Deliberation
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems often treat consensus as evidence of successful interaction. For deliberative problems, however, reliability depends on whether agents preserve the facts and viewpoints needed to interpret an issue. We identify the deliberative illusion: discussion produces (1) factual attrition, the progressive loss of issue-critical facts, alongside (2) stance homogenization, the collapse of diverse positions toward consensus. To measure this process, we introduce DelibTrace, a framework that decomposes each issue into atomic facts, labels issue-critical ones, distributes them across agents, and tracks their survival across discussion rounds. Across ethical and news-based deliberation with three representative LLM families, multi-agent discussion erases up to 72% of issue-critical facts. This loss is consequential: retained evidence can reconstruct the issue misleadingly, final stances remain anchored in base-model priors, and a single malicious agent can inject misinformation into the shrinking shared context. These results reveal a sharper risk: agents can agree more while knowing less. We call for evaluations that measure which facts, uncertainties, and legitimate disagreements survive interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多智能体LLM系统中的"协商幻觉"现象——讨论导致关键事实逐渐丢失（事实损耗）和立场趋同（立场同质化），并提出了用于量化该过程的DelibTrace框架，实验表明多智能体讨论可消除高达72%的关键事实，揭示了"知道得更少却达成更多共识"的风险。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体LLM系统常将共识视为成功交互的标志，但对于需要深思熟虑的协商性问题，系统的可靠性取决于智能体能否保留解释问题所需的事实和观点；本文识别出当前研究中被忽视的问题：讨论过程可能导致关键事实的逐渐丢失和立场的同质化，需要量化这一现象并评估其对协商质量的真实影响。
AI.method: 本文提出DelibTrace框架，将每个议题分解为原子事实，标注其中的关键事实，将其分布到各智能体，并追踪这些事实在讨论轮次中的存活情况；实验在伦理类和新间类两种协商场景中，使用三个代表性LLM家族（GPT、Claude、Llama系列）进行多智能体讨论。
AI.result: 多智能体讨论可消除高达72%的关键事实；保留的事实可能误导性地重构议题，最终立场仍锚定于基础模型的先验分布，且单个恶意智能体可在缩小的共享上下文中注入错误信息；智能体可以在知道更少的情况下达成更多共识。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了"知道得更少却达成更多共识"的尖锐风险，即多智能体讨论系统可能产生表面一致但信息贫瘠的虚假共识；呼吁评估标准应关注哪些事实、不确定性和合法分歧能够在交互中存活，而非仅关注共识达成与否。

title: Plan2Map: A Multimodal Benchmark for Document-Grounded Geospatial Boundary Reconstruction from Planning Records
comment: Project page: https://odeb1.github.io/Plan2Map_Project_Page/. Fabian Degen and Oishi Deb Contributed Equally
summary: Planning records define restrictions over geographic areas, but their source documents often provide only indirect spatial evidence rather than machine-readable boundaries. We introduce Plan2Map, a 208-case multimodal benchmark for document-grounded geospatial boundary reconstruction from UK planning records. Given only a source planning document, systems must reconstruct a valid geospatial boundary from notice text, schedules, map plates, map labels, and boundary annotations; the reference GeoJSON is held out for scoring. We propose GeoPlanAgent, a document-grounded, geospatial-tool-in-the-loop system that decomposes the task into evidence extraction, localisation, map registration, boundary segmentation, projection, and verification. On Plan2Map, GeoPlanAgent achieves 0.736 mean IoU and 0.904 median IoU, with 67.8\% of predictions at or above 0.8 IoU, substantially outperforming direct VLM-to-GeoJSON baselines. Diagnostic analysis shows that direct VLM prediction remains unreliable, while remaining errors are concentrated in localisation and map registration, and supervised boundary segmentation substantially improves pixel-level mask quality. Plan2Map provides a concrete testbed for multimodal geospatial reconstruction from public planning records. Project page: https://odeb1.github.io/Plan2Map_Project_Page/.

AI.tldr: Plan2Map是首个面向英国规划记录的多模态地理空间边界重建基准（208个案例），GeoPlanAgent通过文档驱动的工具循环系统（证据提取、定位、地图配准、边界分割、投影与验证）在该基准上达到0.736平均IoU和0.904中位IoU，显著优于直接VLM-to-GeoJSON基线方法。
AI.motivation: 规划记录定义了地理区域的限制，但其源文档通常只提供间接的空间证据而非机器可读的边界，现有方法缺乏从非结构化规划文档中自动重建有效地理空间边界的标准化评估基准与端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 提出GeoPlanAgent系统，采用文档驱动的地理空间工具循环架构，将任务分解为证据提取、定位、地图配准、边界分割、投影和验证六个子步骤；同时构建Plan2Map基准，包含208个案例，要求系统仅从源规划文档（通知文本、附表、地图图版、地图标签和边界注释）中重建有效地理空间边界，以隐藏的参考GeoJSON进行评分。
AI.result: GeoPlanAgent在Plan2Map上达到0.736平均IoU和0.904中位IoU，67.8%的预测达到0.8 IoU以上，大幅优于直接VLM-to-GeoJSON基线；诊断分析表明直接VLM预测仍不可靠，剩余错误集中于定位和地图配准阶段，而有监督边界分割显著提升了像素级掩码质量。
AI.conclusion: Plan2Map为从公共规划记录中进行多模态地理空间重建提供了具体测试平台，GeoPlanAgent的分步工具循环策略有效克服了端到端VLM方法的局限性，同时揭示了定位与地图配准是当前系统的主要瓶颈，为后续研究指明了改进方向。

title: Toward a Modular Architecture for Embedded AI Agent Systems at the Edge
summary:
The rise of Large Language Models (LLMs) has enabled agentic AI capable of complex reasoning and tool use; however, deploying such autonomy in pervasive computing environments remains challenging due to the strict memory and energy constraints of embedded microcontrollers. Existing frameworks typically assume server-class resources or continuous connectivity, leaving a gap for deeply embedded systems. This paper proposes a modular reference architecture for Embedded Agent Systems that bridges the divide between deterministic real-time control and agentic intelligence.
  We introduce a tiered design that decouples On-Device Agents - executing highly compressed neural networks and rule-based logic for low-latency, privacy-critical tasks - from Cloud-Augmented Agents that leverage Small Language Models (SLMs) for higher-level reasoning and planning. A key contribution is the integration of a cross-cutting Governance Layer, ensuring observability, policy enforcement, and safety across distributed fleets of autonomous devices. Rather than presenting purely empirical benchmarks, we analyze architectural design principles and trade-offs regarding latency, energy, and reliable execution in resource-constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向资源受限嵌入式微控制器的模块化参考架构，通过分层设计将On-Device Agents（压缩神经网络+规则逻辑）与Cloud-Augmented Agents（小型语言模型）解耦，并引入跨设备治理层实现可观测性和策略执行，从而弥合确定性实时控制与智能推理之间的鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型使得智能体具备复杂推理和工具使用能力，但在普适计算环境中，嵌入式微控制器面临严格的内存和能耗约束，现有框架通常假设服务器级资源或持续网络连接，缺乏面向深度嵌入式系统的轻量级智能体部署方案。
AI.method: 提出一种模块化参考架构，采用分层设计：On-Device Agents执行高度压缩的神经网络和规则逻辑以完成低延迟、隐私关键的任务；Cloud-Augmented Agents利用小型语言模型进行高层推理和规划；并通过跨切面治理层实现分布式设备集群的可观测性、策略执行与安全性保障。
AI.result: 本文未提供纯经验性基准实验结果，而是系统分析了在资源受限环境中延迟、能耗和可靠执行之间的架构设计原则与权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为将智能体智能引入深度嵌入式系统提供了系统化的设计蓝图，其模块化分层架构与治理机制为未来在资源受限设备上安全、可靠地部署自主智能体奠定了理论基础和工程指导。

title: MetaWorld: Scaling Multi-Agent Video World Model from Single-view Video Data
summary: Video world models are a foundational generative technology for embodied AI and the Metaverse, yet existing approaches are inherently limited to a single agent observing from a single perspective. Extending these models to multi-agent settings introduces two critical challenges: data scarcity (coordinated multi-view recordings are prohibitively expensive to collect for general open-domain scenarios) and world state alignment (independently generated video streams cannot ensure that shared physical environments and events evolve consistently across views). To address these challenges, we propose MetaWorld, a novel framework that scales multi-agent video world models to open-domain environments directly from single-view videos. First, we introduce Monocular World-State Unrolling (MWSU) to explicitly decompose monocular footage into the camera operator's ego-motion and the visible subject's spatial trajectory. This camera-trajectory decomposition naturally extracts synchronized multi-agent motion data within a shared 3D space, completely bypassing the need for multi-camera setups. Second, for precise visual control, we develop the Subject-Aware World Generator to enable appearance-driven simulation conditioned on per-agent identity images. Finally, to ensure both views are grounded in the identical physical reality, we propose World-State Alignment, a per-frame inter-branch cross-attention mechanism inserted at every transformer layer of the video DiT. By jointly synchronizing the denoising process, WSA enforces both static geometric consistency and dynamic motion consistency, encouraging that the shared 3D environment and physical events remain well-aligned across both egocentric views. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MetaWorld achieves superior cross-view consistency and identity fidelity, establishing a highly scalable, physics-driven paradigm for multi-agent video world modeling.

AI.tldr: MetaWorld提出了一种从单视角视频构建多智能体视频世界模型的框架，通过单目世界状态展开（MWSU）分解相机与主体运动、主体感知世界生成器实现外观驱动模拟、以及世界状态对齐（WSA）机制确保跨视角一致性，在无需多摄像机数据的前提下实现了高精度的物理一致多视角视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体视频世界模型面临两大核心挑战：一是多视角协调录制的数据获取成本极高，难以在开放域场景中大规模收集；二是独立生成的视频流无法保证共享物理环境与事件在不同视角下的一致性演化。本文旨在从低成本的单视角视频出发，构建具有跨视角一致性的多智能体视频世界模型。
AI.method: MetaWorld提出三项关键技术：1）单目世界状态展开（MWSU），将单目视频分解为摄像机操作者的自我运动与可见主体的空间轨迹，在共享3D空间中自然提取同步多智能体运动数据；2）主体感知世界生成器，基于逐智能体身份图像实现外观驱动的条件模拟；3）世界状态对齐（WSA），在视频DiT的每个Transformer层中插入逐帧跨分支交叉注意力机制，联合同步去噪过程，同时保证静态几何一致性与动态运动一致性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，MetaWorld在跨视角一致性和身份保真度上均达到了优越性能，建立了一种高度可扩展的、基于物理驱动的多智能体视频世界建模范式。
AI.conclusion: MetaWorld通过从单视角视频中提取同步多智能体数据并引入跨视角对齐机制，有效解决了多智能体视频世界模型中的数据稀缺和状态对齐难题，为面向开放域环境的具身AI与元宇宙应用提供了可扩展的物理驱动建模方案。

title: When Helping Hurts and How to Fix It: Multi-Agent Debate for Data Cleaning
comment: 27 pages, 4 figures, 12 tables. Includes appendix with full experimental results, prompt templates, and dataset statistics
summary: When does multi-agent debate help data cleaning, and when does it hurt? Across three benchmarks, four model families, and over 6,000 task-condition pairs, we find debate's effect reverses sign: it degrades generation across all four models (-1.6 to -15.5pp) through critique-induced confusion (CIC), hallucinated Critic feedback that the Generator accepts uncritically, yet improves error detection (+27.4pp F1, d=1.0). We derive a debate benefit condition: debate helps when the probability of rescuing a wrong output (Critic verification odds weighted by fixability) exceeds the probability of destroying a correct one. A factorial experiment proves adversarial separation is essential: self-verification with identical tools fails, while a separate Critic with code-execution grounding and evidence-gated generation produces the first debate configuration to significantly exceed single-agent on a generative task (+5.3pp, p<0.05). The condition correctly predicts all nine task types and generalizes with zero false positives across 19 published comparisons in seven domains.

AI.tldr: 通过大规模实验发现，多智能体辩论在数据清洗中对生成任务有害（性能下降1.6-15.5pp），但对错误检测有益（F1提升27.4pp）；提出辩论收益条件，并证明对抗性分离（独立Critic配合代码执行验证与证据门控生成）是产生生成收益的关键配置。
AI.motivation: 多智能体辩论在数据清洗中的作用存在争议，现有研究缺乏对其何时有益、何时有害的系统性理解，尤其缺少对跨模型、跨任务的大规模定量分析以及可解释的收益条件。
AI.method: 基于6000+任务-条件对，对四种模型家族、三个基准进行辩论效果分析；提出"辩论收益条件"（Critic验证成功概率×可修复性 > 破坏正确输出的概率）；通过析因实验验证对抗性分离（独立Critic + 代码执行验证 + 证据门控生成）的有效性。
AI.result: 辩论在生成任务中导致所有四种模型性能下降1.6-15.5pp，归因于批评诱导混淆（Critic生成幻觉反馈且Generator不加批判地接受）；在错误检测任务中F1提升27.4pp（效应量d=1.0）；自验证（相同工具）失败，而对抗性分离配置在生成任务上首次显著超过单智能体（+5.3pp, p<0.05）；条件正确预测全部9种任务类型，在7个领域19个已发表对比中零假阳性。
AI.conclusion: 辩论效果取决于任务类型与架构设计：对抗性分离（而非自我验证）是释放辩论收益的关键，辩论收益条件为预测何时采用辩论策略提供了理论指导，有助于推动多智能体系统在实际数据清洗中的有效部署。

title: MemTrain: Self-Supervised Context Memory Training
summary: Memory is an indispensable capability for long-horizon LLM agents, enabling them to preserve and utilize information accumulated across extended interactions. Existing memory-agent approaches are typically trained end-to-end with reinforcement learning on downstream tasks. However, collecting high-quality annotated problems for memory-intensive scenarios is costly, and the resulting training data often lack sufficient diversity to cover general memory behaviors. In this work, we propose MemTrain, a self-supervised training framework for generally enhancing the context-memory capability of LLM agents for more effective downstream post-training. MemTrain introduces two coupled proxy tasks over unlabeled Wikipedia corpora: (1) an end-to-end masked reconstruction objective, which requires the model to recover masked entities after multiple rounds of memory updates, thereby encouraging memory maintenance from the final outcome perspective; and (2) an intermediate memory recall objective, which requires the model to reconstruct masked historical information using intermediate memory states, encouraging faithful compression and memory completeness throughout the interaction process. The two objectives are jointly optimized using GRPO. Extensive experiments on long-text QA and search-based QA benchmarks demonstrate that MemTrain consistently improves downstream memory-intensive reasoning performance across different models, achieving gains of up to 17.67 points over direct task-specific post-training.

AI.tldr: MemTrain提出了一种自监督训练框架，通过掩码重建和中间记忆召回两个代理任务在无标注维基百科语料上联合优化，以增强LLM智能体的上下文记忆能力，在长文本和检索式QA任务上取得了高达17.67分的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于记忆的LLM智能体方法通常依赖强化学习在下游任务上进行端到端训练，但为记忆密集型场景收集高质量标注问题成本高昂且训练数据多样性不足，难以覆盖通用记忆行为。
AI.method: MemTrain提出了一种自监督训练框架，包含两个耦合的代理任务：(1) 端到端掩码重建目标——要求模型在多轮记忆更新后恢复被掩码的实体，从最终结果角度鼓励记忆维护；(2) 中间记忆召回目标——要求模型利用中间记忆状态重建被掩码的历史信息，促进整个交互过程中的忠实压缩和记忆完整性。两个目标通过GRPO进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在长文本QA和检索式QA基准上的大量实验表明，MemTrain在不同模型上均能一致提升下游记忆密集型推理性能，相较于直接的任务特定后训练，取得了最高17.67个百分点的增益。
AI.conclusion: MemTrain通过自监督方式在无标注语料上预训练记忆能力，有效降低了标注成本并提升了记忆行为的通用性，为后续下游任务后训练提供了更强的记忆基础，展示了自监督记忆训练在大规模LLM智能体中的潜力。

title: GeoDrive-Bench: Benchmarking Region-Specific Multimodal Reasoning in Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) for autonomous driving have shown promising performance, but their ability to handle region-specific traffic rules remains underexplored, raising uncertainties about their deployment across diverse global settings. We therefore introduce GeoDrive-Bench, a novel benchmark that enables the systematic investigation of VLMs' geo-culturally grounded driving reasoning. We curated 5,053 human-validated multiple-choice QA pairs across six countries covering diverse driving cultures. Specifically, we emphasize four driving tasks: perception, prediction, planning, and region reasoning. Each question requires models to infer the correct driving behavior from visual evidence and local traffic conventions without explicit country labels. Beyond evaluation, we further design a distillation algorithm that injects region-specific traffic-rule knowledge into the internal representations of VLMs, enabling models to better align visual scene understanding with local driving policies. Experiments on nine state-of-the-art VLMs show substantial performance variations across geo-driving cultures for each task, while our proposed baseline models exhibit improved geo-cultural reasoning across regions. These results suggest that current VLMs still lack robust region-aware driving intelligence and highlight GeoDrive-Bench as a diagnostic and training-oriented testbed for deployable autonomous driving foundation models.

AI.tldr: GeoDrive-Bench 是一个用于系统评估和提升视觉-语言模型（VLM）在不同地区驾驶文化与交通规则下推理能力的基准数据集和蒸馏算法，揭示了当前VLM在区域感知驾驶智能方面的显著不足。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉-语言模型（VLM）在自动驾驶中展现出有前景的性能，但其处理区域特定交通规则的能力尚未得到系统研究，这引发了模型在多样化全球环境中部署的不确定性，现有基准缺乏对地理文化差异下驾驶推理能力的诊断性评估。
AI.method: 构建了包含5,053个人工验证的多选题对的GeoDrive-Bench，覆盖六个国家及四种核心驾驶任务（感知、预测、规划、区域推理），要求模型在不依赖国家标签的条件下从视觉证据和本地交通惯例推断正确驾驶行为；同时设计了知识蒸馏算法，将区域特定交通规则知识注入VLM内部表征，以增强视觉场景理解与本地驾驶策略的对齐。
AI.result: 在九个最新VLM上的实验表明，模型在不同地理驾驶文化间的各任务表现存在显著差异，而所提出的蒸馏基线模型在跨区域地理文化推理能力上有所提升，揭示了当前VLM仍缺乏鲁棒的区域感知驾驶智能。
AI.conclusion: GeoDrive-Bench可作为可部署自动驾驶基础模型诊断与训练导向的测试平台，当前VLM尚不具备鲁棒的、对驾驶文化具有感知能力的地理区域推理能力，所提出的蒸馏方法为提升模型跨区域适配性提供了可行方向。

title: Large AI Models in Dental Healthcare: From General-Purpose Systems to Domain-Specific Foundation Models
summary:
Background: Oral diseases affect nearly 3.5 billion people worldwide, yet the comparative clinical potential of large-scale AI models in dentistry remains poorly understood. Three distinct model categories have emerged: language-generative models, discriminative vision foundation models, and dental-specific foundation models, with no unified review examining their relationships and collective limitations.
  Methods: Following PRISMA-ScR guidelines, we systematically searched four databases (PubMed, Google Scholar, Scopus, arXiv), screened independently by two reviewers. After applying inclusion/exclusion criteria, 97 studies (2020-2026) were included. We propose a two-dimensional classification framework organizing models by architectural paradigm and dental specialization degree.
  Results: Language-generative models excel at text-based tasks (clinical reasoning, licensing exams, patient communication) but show inconsistent performance on image-dependent diagnostics. Adapted SAM and CLIP variants achieve strong tooth segmentation and lesion detection results. Dental-specific models (DentVFM, DentVLM, OralGPT) demonstrate strongest performance on complex multimodal tasks. Integrated pipelines consistently outperform single-model approaches. A data asymmetry is observed: dental-specific pretraining concentrates almost entirely in the vision domain, reflecting scarce large-scale dental text corpora.
  Conclusions: General-purpose and dental-specific models play complementary roles; the most effective systems combine both within structured pipelines. Safe autonomous deployment requires resolving three persistent barriers: hallucination in generative models, limited annotated dental datasets, and absent standardized clinical evaluation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 该综述通过系统分析97篇研究，提出了基于架构范式和牙科专业化程度的二维分类框架，揭示了通用大模型与牙科专用模型在口腔疾病诊断中的互补角色，并指出数据不对称、幻觉问题和缺乏标准化基准是制约安全自主部署的三大障碍。
AI.motivation: 口腔疾病影响全球近35亿人，但大规模AI模型在牙科领域的临床潜力尚缺乏系统比较，尤其是语言生成模型、判别式视觉基础模型和牙科专用基础模型这三类模型之间的关系和集体局限性未被统一审视。
AI.method: 遵循PRISMA-ScR指南，系统检索PubMed、Google Scholar、Scopus和arXiv四个数据库，由两名评审者独立筛选；纳入2020-2026年间97篇研究，提出基于架构范式（语言生成/视觉判别/多模态）和牙科专业化程度两个维度的分类框架进行统一分析。
AI.result: 语言生成模型在临床推理、执照考试和医患沟通等文本任务中表现优异，但在图像依赖的诊断任务上性能不稳定；适配的SAM和CLIP变体在牙齿分割和病变检测中表现强劲；牙科专用模型（DentVFM、DentVLM、OralGPT）在复杂多模态任务中表现最佳；集成流水线始终优于单模型方法。数据分布呈不对称性：牙科专用预训练几乎全集中在视觉域，反映大规模牙科文本语料极度匮乏。
AI.conclusion: 通用模型与牙科专用模型具有互补性，最有效的系统应在结构化流水线中结合两者；安全自主部署需解决三大持续障碍——生成模型中的幻觉问题、有限的标注牙科数据集以及缺乏标准化的临床评估基准。

title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
summary: We introduce Cosmos 3, a family of omnimodal world models designed to jointly process and generate language, image, video, audio, and action sequences within a unified mixture-of-transformers architecture. By supporting highly flexible input-output configurations, Cosmos 3 seamlessly unifies critical modalities for Physical AI -- effectively subsuming vision-language models, video generators, world simulators, and world-action models into a single framework. Our evaluation demonstrates that Cosmos 3 establishes a new state-of-the-art across a diverse suite of understanding and generation tasks, demonstrating omnimodal world models as scalable, general-purpose backbones for embodied agents. Our post-trained Cosmos 3 models were ranked as the best open-source Text-to-Image and Image-to-Video models by Artificial Analysis, and the best policy model by RoboArena at the time the technical report was written. To accelerate open research and deployment in Physical AI, we make our code, model checkpoints, curated synthetic datasets, and evaluation benchmark available under the Linux Foundation's OpenMDW-1.1 https://openmdw.ai/license/1-1/ License at https://github.com/nvidia/cosmos}{github.com/nvidia/cosmos and https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/cosmos3 . The project website is available at https://research.nvidia.com/labs/cosmos-lab/cosmos3 .

AI.tldr: Cosmos 3 提出了一种基于混合专家Transformer架构的全模态世界模型系列，能够在统一框架中联合处理和生成语言、图像、视频、音频和动作序列，为具身智能体提供了可扩展的通用骨干网络，并在多项理解和生成任务上取得了最先进的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有模型通常针对单一或少数几种模态（如视觉-语言模型、视频生成器、世界模拟器等）独立设计，缺乏一个能够统一处理Physical AI所需的所有关键模态（语言、图像、视频、音频、动作）的通用框架，限制了具身智能体的感知、推理与行动能力的协同发展。
AI.method: Cosmos 3 采用统一的混合专家Transformer架构（mixture-of-transformers），支持高度灵活的输入-输出配置，将视觉-语言模型、视频生成器、世界模拟器和世界-动作模型统一到一个单一框架中，实现语言、图像、视频、音频和动作序列的联合处理与生成。
AI.result: Cosmos 3 在一系列理解和生成任务上建立了新的最先进水平，其经过后训练的模型在Artificial Analysis评测中被列为最佳开源文本到图像和图像到视频模型，在RoboArena评测中被列为最佳策略模型。代码、模型检查点、合成数据集和评测基准已开源发布。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了全模态世界模型作为具身智能体可扩展通用骨干网络的潜力，通过统一多种关键模态为Physical AI提供了更高效的解决方案，并通过全面开源推动相关领域的开放研究与部署。

title: What Benchmarks Don't Measure: The Case for Evaluating Abstention Competence in Autonomous Agents
comment: ACM CAIS 2026: RLEval Workshop Oral Presentation(Best Paper Award)
summary: Benchmarks for autonomous agents measure whether agents complete tasks, yet this framing is systematically blind to whether an agent should have proceeded at all. Agents trained under human-feedback objectives develop a structural tendency to proceed even when they lack the inputs, evidence, or authorization to act safely, a disposition we term compliance bias, because both the reward signal and the benchmark scoring regime treat proceeding as the correct default regardless of whether the preconditions for safe action are present. We make three contributions. We first show that compliance bias originates in reward hacking within human-feedback pipelines and is entrenched by prominent agent benchmarks, which either penalize agents for pausing or are architecturally unable to distinguish a principled pause from a silent failure. We then introduce a three-gap taxonomy of abstention-warranted scenarios, covering specification gaps where required information is absent, verification gaps where world state cannot be confirmed, and authority gaps where explicit authorization has not been given, which together provide a principled basis for constructing abstention-aware agent benchmarks. Finally, we propose abstention evaluation protocols (Safety Rate, Usability Rate, and Informed Refusal Rate) and report preliminary results across 144 enterprise agent scenarios and five model families, in which a runtime-enforced abstention mechanism achieves up to 89.2% hazardous-action blocking and 87.5% usability on authorized scenarios, demonstrating that the safety--usability tradeoff is tunable rather than inherent and that its shape varies substantially across model families. We treat this as preliminary work and offer the taxonomy and composite metrics as a starting point for further conversations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了"合规偏差"概念，指智能体在缺乏安全行动前提时仍倾向于继续执行任务的结构性缺陷，并建立了包含规范缺口、验证缺口和授权缺口的三元分类体系，同时提出了安全率、可用率和知情拒绝率等弃权评估协议。
AI.motivation: 现有自主智能体基准测试仅评估任务完成度，系统性地忽略了智能体是否应当执行任务的判断；在人类反馈训练下，智能体形成了一种倾向于继续执行而非暂停的结构性偏差（合规偏差），因为奖励信号和基准评分机制都将继续执行视为默认正确行为。
AI.method: 论文首先揭示了合规偏差源自人类反馈流水线中的奖励黑客现象，并被现有基准测试所强化；接着提出了涵盖规范缺口（信息缺失）、验证缺口（世界状态无法确认）和授权缺口（未获明确授权）的三元分类体系，为构建弃权感知基准提供理论基础；最后提出了安全率、可用率和知情拒绝率三种弃权评估协议。
AI.result: 在144个企业智能体场景和五个模型族上的初步实验表明，运行时强制弃权机制实现了高达89.2%的危险行为阻断率和87.5%的授权场景可用率，证明安全性与可用性之间的权衡是可调谐的而非固有的，且其形态在不同模型族间存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将合规偏差作为初步发现提出，所提供的分类体系和复合指标可作为后续研究的起点；安全性与可用性之间的权衡是可调谐的这一发现表明，通过合理的机制设计可以在保证安全的前提下维持较高的任务可用性。

title: The Word and the Way: Strategies for Domain-Specific BERT Pre-Training in German Medical NLP
comment: Under revision at BMC Medical Informatics and Decision Making
summary: Digital healthcare generates vast amounts of clinical text that can support AI-assisted applications, yet German biomedical language models remain limited by older architectures or restricted training data. We present ChristBERT (Clinical- and Healthcare-Related Issues and Subjects Tuned BERT), a family of domain-specific German RoBERTa-based language models trained on a 13.5GB corpus of scientific publications, clinical texts, health-related web content, and translated clinical resources. To investigate the impact of domain adaptation strategies in German clinical NLP, we compare continued pre-training, training from scratch, and domain-specific vocabulary adaptation. The resulting models are evaluated on three medical named entity recognition tasks and two text classification tasks. ChristBERT consistently outperforms existing general-purpose and medical German language models on four of five benchmarks and establishes a new state of the art for German clinical language modeling. Our results show that the optimal adaptation strategy is task-dependent: in our evaluation, training from scratch is particularly effective for highly specialized clinical texts, whereas continued pre-training performs well on more commonly written medical texts. All models are publicly released to support future research and applications in German medical NLP.

AI.tldr: ChristBERT 是一系列基于 RoBERTa 的德语生物医学语言模型，通过在 13.5GB 领域语料上比较继续预训练、从头训练和词汇自适应三种策略，在五个临床 NLP 基准上四项取得最优结果，并发现最优适应策略与任务类型高度相关。
AI.motivation: 德语生物医学语言模型受限于较旧的架构（如 BERT）或有限的训练数据，缺乏基于现代架构（如 RoBERTa）并系统比较领域自适应策略的工作，无法为德语临床 NLP 任务提供最优的模型选择指导。
AI.method: 以 RoBERTa 为基础架构，构建包含科学出版物、临床文本、健康相关网络内容及翻译临床资源的 13.5GB 德语生物医学语料库；系统对比三种领域自适应策略：继续预训练（continued pre-training）、从头训练（training from scratch）以及领域词汇自适应（domain-specific vocabulary adaptation），最终在三个医学命名实体识别任务和两个文本分类任务上进行评估。
AI.result: ChristBERT 在五个基准中的四项上一致超越现有通用及医学德语语言模型，创下德语临床语言建模的新最先进水平。具体而言，从头训练策略对高度专业化的临床文本尤为有效，而继续预训练在常见医学文本上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 领域自适应策略的最优选择具有任务依赖性，不同临床 NLP 任务应针对性地选择从头训练或继续预训练；所有模型均已公开，为德语医学 NLP 的未来研究和应用提供基础资源。

title: Automated Report-Derived Oncology VQA Benchmark for Evaluating Vision-Language Models on 3D Medical Imaging
summary: Evaluating vision-language models (VLMs) on medical images requires benchmarks that are clinically grounded, scalable, and controlled for evaluation confounds. Existing public benchmarks are limited in scale, manually annotated, or potentially leaked into VLM pretraining corpora. We present an automated agent-driven pipeline that generates multiple-choice VQA datasets directly from paired private radiology reports and 3D oncology imaging, producing two complementary question types: RADS-style questions deterministically derived from clinician-defined reporting schemas, and radiology report-derived questions generated by an LLM from radiologist findings and verified against the source report. Applied to four in-house cancer cohorts, the pipeline yields an instance-contamination-controlled benchmark without per-question human annotation. Zero-shot evaluation of six VLMs reveals no dominant model and substantial headroom across all cells. A blind ablation reveals that visual reliance is highly dataset-specific: liver Report-derived questions genuinely require the image, while Lung CT is essentially solvable without it - the leading closed model exceeds its sighted accuracy on Lung CT when blinded - indicating that even private clinical data does not guarantee a contamination-controlled read of visual capability. The pipeline is released as an open agent skill for in-house redeployment.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自动化智能体驱动流程，直接从配对的私有放射学报告和3D肿瘤影像生成多选VQA基准，无需人工标注即可生成RADS式和报告派生两类问题，零样本评测揭示当前VLM在医学影像上无主导模型且视觉依赖具有高度数据集特异性。
AI.motivation: 现有医学影像视觉-语言模型（VLM）公开基准在规模、人工标注成本以及可能泄露至VLM预训练语料库等方面存在局限，缺乏临床可落地、可扩展且受控于评估混杂因素的高质量评测数据集。
AI.method: 提出一种自动化智能体驱动流程，从配对的私有放射学报告和3D肿瘤影像直接生成多选VQA数据集。流程产生两类互补问题：一类是依据临床定义报告模式确定性推导的RADS式问题，另一类是由LLM从放射科医生发现的报告中生成并经由源报告验证的报告派生问题，全程无需逐问题人工标注。
AI.result: 在四个院内癌症队列上应用该流程构建了实例级污染受控基准。零样本评测六种VLM显示无主导模型且各指标均存在显著提升空间。盲消融实验揭示视觉依赖具有高度数据集特异性：肝部CT报告派生问题真正需要影像，而胸部CT在盲化情况下（仅用问题）领先闭源模型准确率甚至超过有影像版本，表明即便私有临床数据也不能保证获得无污染的视觉能力评估。
AI.conclusion: 自动化生成私有医学影像VQA基准可行且可扩展，但私有临床数据本身并不足以防止数据污染对视觉能力评估的干扰，提示需要更谨慎的评估设计和跨数据集特异性的视觉依赖分析。

title: Inducing Reasoning Primitives from Agent Traces
summary: ReAct-style LLM agents often rediscover the same reasoning routines across problems, yet leave those routines trapped in transient scratchpads. We introduce Reasoning Primitive Induction, a single-pass method that mines successful ReAct traces, clusters recurrent reasoning moves, and converts the most frequent moves into a compact library of typed pseudo-tools. Each pseudo-tool is specified by a natural-language docstring interpreted by an LLM at invocation time, and a standard ReAct loop composes these primitives at test time. The central result is that induced libraries outperform the very agent that generated their traces: by +44pp on RuleArena NBA (30 -> 74), +30pp on MuSR team allocation (38 -> 68), and +22pp on NatPlan meeting planning (7 -> 29). Across five comparable subtasks spanning narrative deduction, rule application, and constraint-satisfaction planning, a single fixed configuration improves over zero-shot Chain-of-Thought on every subtask, matches or surpasses expert-authored decompositions, and outperforms AWM at lower average inference cost.

AI.tldr: 提出推理原语归纳（Reasoning Primitive Induction）方法，通过从ReAct智能体的成功轨迹中挖掘并聚类高频推理动作，构建可复用的类型化伪工具库，在多个复杂推理任务上显著超越原始智能体及零样本Chain-of-Thought方法。
AI.motivation: ReAct风格的LLM智能体虽然能通过思维轨迹解决推理问题，但每次推理时都会重新发现相同的推理模式，这些模式被困在瞬时的暂存空间中而无法被复用，导致推理效率低下且缺乏知识积累机制。
AI.method: 提出推理原语归纳（Reasoning Primitive Induction），一种单次处理方法：首先挖掘成功的ReAct推理轨迹，然后对其中反复出现的推理动作进行聚类，最后将出现频率最高的推理动作转换为一个紧凑的类型化伪工具库；每个伪工具通过自然语言文档字符串（docstring）定义，在调用时由LLM解释执行，标准ReAct循环在测试时组合这些原语进行推理。
AI.result: 在RuleArena NBA任务上准确率从30%提升至74%（+44pp），在MuSR团队分配任务上从38%提升至68%（+30pp），在NatPlan会议规划任务上从7%提升至29%（+22pp）；在涵盖叙事推理、规则应用和约束满足规划的五个可比子任务上，单一固定配置在每一项任务上均优于零样本Chain-of-Thought，达到或超过专家编写的解构方法，并以更低推理成本超越AWM方法。
AI.conclusion: 从智能体自身的历史轨迹中归纳可复用的推理原语是一种高效且低成本的能力提升方式，所构建的伪工具库不仅能超越原始智能体的性能，还能泛化到不同类型的高阶推理任务上，为LLM智能体的持续自我改进提供了新的范式。

title: SagaQA: A Multi-hop Reasoning Benchmark for Long-form Narrative Understanding in TV Series
summary: We introduce SagaQA, a long-form video benchmark for multi-hop reasoning over full-length TV series. Existing video reasoning benchmarks often emphasize local understanding of adjacent frames or clips. SagaQA addresses this gap by requiring high-level comprehension of extended multimodal narratives in entire TV shows. A distinguishing feature of SagaQA is the granularity of its reasoning steps. Our dataset necessitates long-range reasoning hops to connect information across completely different episodes. This requires models to reason over entire events and actions, demanding a deep understanding of the show's narration and progression at a multimodal level. Motivated by recent progress in agentic methods, we further study how different planning strategies handle such complex reasoning. We categorize these approaches into three classes-Parallel, Sequential, and Hybrid planners-and evaluate their ability to generate coherent and complete reasoning plans. Our results on SagaQA suggest that hybrid planners consistently produce higher-quality plans and exhibit stronger capabilities for complex, high-level narrative understanding in TV shows.

AI.tldr: SagaQA是一个针对完整电视剧集的长视频基准数据集，要求模型跨剧集进行多跳推理以理解多模态叙事，实验表明混合规划器在复杂叙事理解上优于并行和顺序规划器。
AI.motivation: 现有视频推理基准大多聚焦于相邻帧或短片段间的局部理解，缺乏对完整电视剧中扩展多模态叙事的高层理解能力；SagaQA旨在填补这一空白，要求模型跨完全不同剧集进行长距离推理跳跃以连接信息，从而推动对整体事件和行为级别的深度理解。
AI.method: SagaQA构建了基于完整电视剧集的长视频多跳推理基准，要求模型在整部剧集范围内进行跨剧集推理；受智能体方法进展启发，论文将推理规划策略分为并行(Parallel)、顺序(Sequential)和混合(Hybrid)三类规划器，系统评估它们在生成连贯完整推理计划方面的能力。
AI.result: 在SagaQA基准上的实验结果显示，混合规划器( Hybrid planners )始终能生成更高质量的推理计划，并在复杂的高层叙事理解任务中展现出更强的能力，优于并行和顺序规划器。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了跨剧集长视频推理的挑战性，证明了混合规划策略在复杂多模态叙事理解中的有效性，为未来长视频多跳推理和智能体规划方法的研究提供了新的基准和方向。

title: Any2Poster: Any-Source Poster Generation Across Modalities and Domains
summary: Visual posters are a compact medium for communicating dense information, yet progress on automatic poster generation remains difficult to measure because existing evaluations are often restricted to paper-only inputs, narrow domains, or surface-level visual similarity. We introduce Any2Poster Bench, a benchmark for any-source poster generation that evaluates systems across eight input modalities--PDFs, URLs, PPTX, DOCX, Markdown, LaTeX, notebooks, and videos--and five content domains. Any2Poster Bench pairs each source with quiz-based probes of verbatim factual retention and interpretive understanding, together with VLM-based judgments of visual quality, layout, readability, content completeness, and logical flow, enabling reproducible assessment of both information fidelity and visual communication. To instantiate and validate this benchmark, we further present Any2Poster Agent, an end-to-end reference agent that parses heterogeneous sources, organizes salient content, plans poster layouts, renders posters, and iteratively refines them using visual feedback. On Any2Poster Bench, Any2Poster Agent achieves 87.25% average accuracy across input modalities and 87.28% across content domains. On PaperQuiz-style evaluation, where prior paper-to-poster agents are directly comparable, Any2Poster Agent improves over PosterAgent-4o from 51.06-51.33% to 72.58% overall accuracy and from 116-121 to 145.16 in density-augmented score. Together, Any2Poster Bench and Any2Poster Agent provide a reusable evaluation resource and a competitive baseline for studying multimodal, domain-general poster generation.

AI.tldr: 提出Any2Poster Bench基准测试和Any2Poster Agent智能体，系统评估和实现从八种输入模态到海报的生成，覆盖信息保真度和视觉传达质量，并在多模态、跨领域场景下取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有自动海报生成领域的评估方法存在局限性：输入来源仅限于论文、领域狭窄或仅衡量表面视觉相似性，缺乏对多模态输入和信息保真度的系统性评估标准，因此难以可靠衡量海报生成系统的真实能力。
AI.method: 提出Any2Poster Bench基准，覆盖PDF、URL、PPTX、DOCX、Markdown、LaTeX、笔记本和视频共八种输入模态及五个内容领域，使用基于问答的逐字事实保留测试和解释性理解测试评估信息保真度，并结合VLM对视觉质量、布局、可读性、内容完整性和逻辑流进行判断。同时构建Any2Poster Agent端到端参考智能体，能够解析异构源、组织关键内容、规划布局、渲染海报并通过视觉反馈迭代优化。
AI.result: Any2Poster Agent在Any2Poster Bench上实现87.25%平均准确率（跨输入模态）和87.28%（跨内容领域）；在PaperQuiz风格评估中，与PosterAgent-4o相比，总体准确率从51.06-51.33%提升至72.58%，密度增强分数从116-121提升至145.16。
AI.conclusion: Any2Poster Bench提供了可复用的多模态海报生成评估资源，Any2Poster Agent作为强竞争基线，展示了在通用领域海报生成任务上的显著进步，为后续研究提供了标准化评估框架和可比较的基线系统。

title: AUDITFLOW: Executable Symbolic Environments for Structured Financial Reporting Verification
summary: Structured financial audit verification is difficult for language-model agents because correctness depends on structured evidence rather than text alone. A model must link reported facts to taxonomy concepts, traverse calculation or dimensional relations, and recompute expected values before applying an audit rule. We propose AuditFlow, a graph-grounded multi-agent framework that separates adaptive search from deterministic verification. AuditFlow builds a symbolic environment from a static US-GAAP taxonomy graph and a dynamic XBRL filing graph, and exposes it through typed tools for fact retrieval, taxonomy traversal, numerical checking, and rule evaluation. Two junior auditors inspect each case from regulatory and evidentiary views, while a senior auditor resolves disagreements and can request further investigation. The final reports are fused through evidential aggregation to produce an audit verdict, expected value, evidence trail, and trustworthiness score. On a FinAuditing-derived FinMR sample, AuditFlow reaches 82.09% joint audit accuracy under GPT-5.5, outperforming the strongest baseline by 14.93 points. Removing deterministic checks drops accuracy to 17.91%, showing that the symbolic environment performs the verification step that the model cannot reliably replace.

AI.tldr: AuditFlow是一个基于符号图的多智能体审计框架，通过将自适应搜索与确定性验证分离，在图结构化的财务证据上进行审计核查。在FinMR数据集上达到82.09%的联合审计准确率，超过最强基线14.93个百分点，且移除确定性验证后准确率骤降至17.91%，表明符号环境执行了模型无法可靠替代的验证步骤。
AI.motivation: 结构化财务审计验证对语言模型智能体具有挑战性，因为正确性依赖于结构化证据而非纯文本——模型必须将报告事实链接到分类法概念、遍历计算或维度关系、重新计算预期值后再应用审计规则，现有方法难以可靠地完成这一复杂推理链条。
AI.method: AuditFlow提出图基多智能体框架，构建包含静态US-GAAP分类法图和动态XBRL申报文件的符号环境，通过类型化工具暴露事实检索、分类法遍历、数值校验和规则评估功能；两个初级审计员分别从监管和证据视角检查案例，高级审计员解决分歧并决定是否追加调查，最终通过证据聚合融合报告产生审计结论、预期值、证据链和可信度评分。
AI.result: 在FinMR样本上，AuditFlow在GPT-5.5下达到82.09%的联合审计准确率，超过最强基线14.93个百分点；移除确定性符号校验后准确率骤降至17.91%，证明符号环境执行了模型无法可靠替代的核心验证步骤。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将结构化符号推理与语言模型智能体分离的设计范式对于需要严格确定性验证的金融审计任务至关重要，符号环境承担了模型本身难以替代的精确验证步骤，为构建可靠的专业领域AI审计系统提供了有效路径。

title: Beyond the Literal: Decomposing Pragmatic Intent in Multimodal Meme Understanding
summary: When asked what a meme or sarcastic post means, Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) tend to describe what the image shows rather than what the author is trying to communicate. Standard instruction tuning entangles a post's literal content with its pragmatic meaning, letting surface-level details contaminate the final response. We reframe meme understanding as a problem of literal-pragmatic decomposition and propose \textbf{Intent Projection}, a framework that separates the two signals at the representation, output, and objective levels within a single LVLM backbone. At the representation level, an orthogonal projection module removes dominant unimodal directions from the fused image-text representation, retaining only the pragmatic residual, while a surface-real affect classifier anchors the decoder with a discrete tag that names the polarity gap. At the output level, the model externalizes a structured reasoning chain, and at the objective level a contrastive reward explicitly penalizes answers that restate the literal description. Across six multimodal benchmarks, Intent Projection consistently outperforms open-source baselines and narrows the gap to proprietary models, with the largest gains on high-divergence posts where literal collapse is most damaging.

AI.tldr: 提出Intent Projection框架，通过正交投影将字面内容与语用意义在表征、输出和目标三个层面解耦，使LVLM在模因与反讽理解任务上显著优于开源基线，逼近闭源模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在理解模因或反讽帖子时倾向于描述图像的字面内容而非作者的语用意图，标准指令微调将帖子的字面内容与其语用意义纠缠在一起，导致表面细节污染最终回答，缺乏对字面-语用信息的有效分离机制。
AI.method: 提出Intent Projection框架，在单一LVLM骨干网络内部从表征、输出和目标三个层面分离字面信号与语用信号：表征层面通过正交投影模块从融合的图像-文本表示中移除主导的单模态方向，保留语用残差，并由表面真实情感分类器提供离散极性标签锚定解码器；输出层面使模型外化结构化推理链；目标层面使用对比奖励显式惩罚复述字面描述的答案。
AI.result: 在六个多模态基准测试上，Intent Projection一致性地优于开源基线模型，并缩小了与闭源模型的差距，在字面-语用偏离度高的帖子（即字面塌缩最严重的样本）上提升最为显著。
AI.conclusion: 将模因理解重构为字面-语用分解问题并引入多层次解耦机制是提升LVLM语用理解能力的有效路径，字面与语用信号的对齐与分离对高阶多模态语义推理具有关键意义。

title: ATLAS: A Large-Scale Evaluation Benchmark for Adversarial LiDAR Perception
summary: Autonomous driving perception is typically evaluated on clean benchmark data, yet real-world deployment requires robustness to rare, structured, and potentially adversarial sensor anomalies. This gap is especially critical for LiDAR, where external actors can physically manipulate the sensing process to induce black-box perception failures without accessing the model. Existing LiDAR benchmarks provide little visibility into this failure mode. Prior adversarial LiDAR studies have largely centered on attack hardware, geometric and algorithmic defenses, and early-generation detectors, leaving the robustness of modern perception systems unexplored. To address this evaluation gap, we introduce ATLAS (Adversarial Temporal LiDAR Attack Suite), the first large-scale, physically grounded evaluation benchmark for LiDAR perception models under black-box sensor attacks, simulating the two primary attack modes -- point injection and point removal -- across real driving sequences. Evaluating a broad cross-section of current state-of-the-art LiDAR perception models, ATLAS reveals a surprising robustness asymmetry: models with stronger performance on standard benchmarks tend to better withstand removal attacks, yet are actually more vulnerable to injection attacks than weaker models. We trace this vulnerability to standard object database sampling augmentations, revealing how current training practices can induce architecture-agnostic robustness failures, and study initial directions for mitigating both attack modes. We release the ATLAS generation code to support extensible, reproducible evaluations as attack capabilities evolve, helping make black-box sensor robustness an explicit consideration in future LiDAR perception development.

AI.tldr: ATLAS是首个大规模、物理可实现的LiDAR感知模型黑盒对抗攻击评测基准，涵盖点注入与点移除两种攻击模式，揭示出现代感知模型在标准基准上表现越强、对注入攻击反而越脆弱的不对称鲁棒性现象，并溯源至物体数据库采样数据增强方法。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶LiDAR感知模型在真实部署中面临外部物理攻击导致的黑盒感知失败风险，而现有LiDAR评测基准缺乏对这一失效模式的可见性，早期对抗LiDAR研究多关注攻击硬件、几何/算法防御及早期检测器，未系统探索现代感知模型的鲁棒性，存在显著的评测空白。
AI.method: ATLAS构建了大规模物理可实现的评测基准，通过模拟黑盒传感器攻击的两种主要模式——点注入与点移除，在真实驾驶序列上对当前主流LiDAR感知模型进行全面评估，并进一步分析标准物体数据库采样数据增强对鲁棒性的影响，探索缓解两种攻击模式的初步方向。
AI.result: 大规模评测发现显著的鲁棒性不对称现象：在标准基准上表现更强的模型对点移除攻击具有更好的鲁棒性，但对点注入攻击却比弱模型更脆弱；该脆弱性可归因于标准物体数据库采样数据增强方法，这种当前训练实践会引发与架构无关的鲁棒性失效。
AI.conclusion: ATLAS揭示了现代LiDAR感知模型在对抗鲁棒性上的系统性缺陷及其训练层面的根源，表明黑盒传感器鲁棒性应成为未来LiDAR感知开发中的显式考量因素，并提供了可扩展、可复现的评测代码以支撑后续研究。

title: ToolGate: Token-Efficient Pre-Call Control for Tool-Augmented Vision-Language Agents
summary: Tool-augmented vision-language agents can acquire external perceptual evidence through OCR, detection, segmentation, and other tools, but executing every proposed tool call is costly and sometimes unnecessary. We study the pre-call control problem: after a ReAct-style VLM agent proposes a perceptual tool call, should the call be executed, or skipped before its output enters the context? Across five benchmarks, we find that the baseline agent exhibits poor local selectivity: helpful and harmful calls occur at similar rates (11.8% vs. 9.9%), while most calls do not change the immediate forced-answer prediction. We introduce ToolGate, a lightweight external controller that predicts execute/skip decisions from trajectory text and simple structural features. Across two Qwen3-VL backbones, ToolGate reduces token cost to 64-69% of the unrestricted ReAct baseline while preserving average accuracy in cross-domain settings. With matched-domain trajectory training on Qwen3-VL-30B, it further improves average accuracy by 1.65 points. These results show that tool-augmented VLM agents benefit not only from better perceptual tools, but also from explicit control over when tool outputs are worth paying for.

AI.tldr: 提出ToolGate，一种轻量级外部控制器，在ReAct式工具增强视觉语言智能体执行感知工具调用前预测是否应跳过，在跨领域基准上降低令牌成本至64-69%的同时保持或提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前工具增强的视觉语言智能体在ReAct框架下会频繁提出感知工具（如OCR、检测、分割）调用，但并非所有调用都有必要，执行每个提议的工具调用成本高昂且有时无益；基线智能体存在局部选择性差的问题，有益与有害调用比例相近（11.8% vs 9.9%），大多数调用不改变即时强制答案预测，因此亟需在工具调用输出进入上下文前对其进行预调用控制。
AI.method: 提出ToolGate，一种轻量级外部控制器，通过从轨迹文本和简单结构特征中提取信息，预测每个提议的工具调用是执行（execute）还是跳过（skip）；该方法作为ReAct式VLM智能体的前置控制模块，在感知工具调用真正执行前进行决策，避免不必要的计算开销。
AI.result: 在五个基准上，使用两个Qwen3-VL骨干网络，ToolGate将令牌成本降低至无约束ReAct基线的64-69%，同时在跨领域设置下保持平均准确率；在Qwen3-VL-30B上进行同领域轨迹训练后，平均准确率进一步提升1.65个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 工具增强的视觉语言智能体不仅受益于更好的感知工具本身，还受益于对工具输出是否值得付出的显式控制；通过在工具调用前引入轻量级控制机制，可以在大幅降低计算成本的同时维持甚至提升任务性能。

title: MUSE: A Unified Agentic Harness for MLLMs
summary: Despite rapid progress, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) still fail on tasks that humans solve effortlessly, such as navigating a grid maze from a screenshot or selecting the correct puzzle piece. Rather than retraining the model, we ask a complementary question: how much capability can be elicited from a frozen MLLM purely by improving the execution scaffold around it? We introduce MUSE, a multimodal unified structured execution harness that wraps any off-the-shelf MLLM with composable modules for task representation, visual processing, perception tool use, structured parsing, deterministic verification, and verifier-guided repair, without any model retraining. We evaluate MUSE across diverse benchmarks spanning visual spatial planning, visual perception, multimodal reasoning, and fine-grained visual discrimination, using multiple state-of-the-art MLLMs. MUSE delivers consistent gains over the bare model in all settings, with the largest jumps on challenging instances. Further analysis reveals that many MLLM failures arise from harness-level shortcomings rather than fundamental model deficits, and can be addressed through verifier-guided repair without touching the model. These findings highlight the agentic multimodal harness as a critical yet underexplored design dimension, offering an orthogonal avenue for improving MLLMs beyond model-centric optimization.

AI.tldr: MUSE是一种无需重新训练模型的多模态统一结构化执行框架，通过改进外部执行脚手架而非模型本身，在多个基准上显著提升了冻结多模态大语言模型在视觉空间规划、感知、推理和细粒度判别任务上的表现，揭示了多模态执行支架是提升MLLM能力的关键但被低估的设计维度。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在人类能轻松完成的任务（如从截图中导航网格迷宫或选择正确拼图块）上仍表现不佳，现有研究多集中在模型重训练或微调上，而提高冻结模型外部执行脚手架的能力这一正交方向尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: MUSE是一个多模态统一结构化执行框架，包裹任意现成的冻结MLLM，包含任务表示、视觉处理、感知工具使用、结构化解析、确定性验证和验证器引导修复等可组合模块，无需任何模型重训练。
AI.result: 在覆盖视觉空间规划、视觉感知、多模态推理和细粒度视觉判别的多个基准上，MUSE在使用多种先进MLLM时均比裸模型取得了一致性提升，尤其在最具挑战性的实例上提升最为显著。
AI.conclusion: 许多MLLM的失败源于执行支架层面的缺陷而非模型本身的能力不足，这些问题可通过验证器引导修复在不触及模型参数的情况下解决，表明智能体式多模态执行支架是提升MLLM能力的关键且未被充分重视的设计维度。

title: SkillDAG: Self-Evolving Typed Skill Graphs for LLM Skill Selection at Scale
summary: As LLM agents adopt large skill libraries, selecting the right subset becomes a structural problem rather than a similarity-matching one: skills depend on, conflict with, specialize, or duplicate one another, a structure invisible to both full enumeration and embedding similarity. We present SkillDAG, which models inter-skill relationships as a typed directed graph and exposes it to an LLM agent as an inference-time, agent-callable structural retrieval interface, queried and evolved during execution rather than baked into a fixed retrieval pipeline: each search returns vector matches, typed-edge neighbors, and conflict signals, and a propose-then-commit protocol lets the agent register execution-backed edges so the graph accumulates structure across episodes. On ALFWorld and SkillsBench with MiniMax-M2.7, SkillDAG reaches 67.1% success and 27.3% reward, exceeding the strongest reported Graph-of-Skills baseline by +12.8 and +8.6 points; the advantage ports to gpt-5.2-codex, and intrinsic SkillsBench Ret@K rises from 65.5 to 78.2 under matched queries. These gains trace to isolable mechanisms: candidate ranking that stays robust as the pool grows 10x where a fixed seeding-diffusion pipeline degrades, and set-monotone online edits that enlarge ground-truth recall without evicting prior hits.

AI.tldr: SkillDAG 提出一种结构化技能关系图，将技能间依赖、冲突、特化与重复等关系建模为有向图，并作为推理时可调用的检索接口，使 LLM 智能体在执行过程中动态查询与演化图结构，在 ALFWorld 与 SkillsBench 上显著超越基于固定扩散或相似性匹配的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 智能体在拥有大规模技能库时，通常依赖全量枚举或嵌入相似性来选择技能，但技能之间实际存在依赖、冲突、特化与重复等结构性关系，这些关系既不能被枚举捕获，也不能被向量相似度揭示，导致技能选择无法适应结构化任务需求。
AI.method: SkillDAG 将技能间关系建模为带类型的有向图，并作为推理时可被智能体调用的结构化检索接口，而非固定的检索管道；每次检索同时返回向量匹配结果、类型化边邻居与冲突信号；同时采用“提议-提交”协议，让智能体在执行过程中注册经过执行验证的边，从而使图结构在多个 episode 间持续演化积累。
AI.result: 在 ALFWorld 和 SkillsBench 上使用 MiniMax-M2.7 模型，SkillDAG 达到 67.1% 的成功率和 27.3% 的奖励，分别超过最强的 Graph-of-Skills 基线 +12.8 和 +8.6 个百分点；该优势可迁移至 gpt-5.2-codex；在 SkillsBench 上，匹配查询下的内在 Ret@K 从 65.5 提升至 78.2；候选排名在技能池扩展 10 倍时仍保持稳健，而固定扩散管道则性能下降，且集合单调的在线编辑在不驱逐已有命中前提下扩大真实召回。
AI.conclusion: SkillDAG 表明，将技能关系显式建模为可演化图结构并作为推理时接口而非固定管道，能显著提升 LLM 智能体在大规模技能库下的选择鲁棒性与性能；其成功来源于候选排序的可扩展性与在线编辑的集合单调性两个可分离机制，为面向结构化技能检索的智能体设计提供了新范式。

title: Backdoor Unlearning Generalization: A Path Toward the Removal of Unknown Triggers in LLMs
summary: Backdoor attacks in Large Language Models (LLMs) are a growing security concern, where models can generate adversary-chosen content. Existing defenses target backdoors one at a time and typically require knowledge of the trigger, leaving the defender at a structural disadvantage when unknown backdoors may exist in a model. We show that backdoor neutralization through unlearning generalizes across backdoors: training a model to ignore a single trigger can also suppress other backdoors that were never explicitly targeted. We study this phenomenon across three model families, whose backdoors were injected via pretraining or continual pretraining, by analyzing the models obtained after removing one backdoor at a time. To understand why unlearning certain backdoors induces the suppression of others, we introduce the Cross Activation Shift Distance, to quantify the distance between model changes induced by different trainings. Our results open a new direction for LLM safety as defenders could deliberately inject controlled backdoors and then remove them, leveraging cross-backdoor transfer to also suppress unknown backdoors that an attacker may have previously introduced in the model.

AI.tldr: 本文发现针对大语言模型的后门消除（unlearning）具有跨后门泛化能力：消除一个触发器的训练同时会抑制其他从未被明确针对的后门；引入跨激活偏移距离（Cross Activation Shift Distance）量化该现象，并据此提出一种新型防御思路——防御者主动注入目标后门再消除，以压制模型中可能存在的未知后门。
AI.motivation: 现有针对大语言模型后门攻击的防御方法一次只能应对一种后门，且通常需要知道触发器的具体形式，这使得防御者在面对模型中可能存在的未知后门时处于结构性劣势；亟需一种能够同时压制多种未知后门的方法。
AI.method: 研究通过对比分析在三个不同模型家族上分别移除单个后门（后门通过预训练或持续预训练注入）后模型的行为变化，验证跨后门迁移泛化现象；并提出了跨激活偏移距离（Cross Activation Shift Distance）这一度量指标，用于量化不同训练过程所引发的模型改变之间的相似性，从而解释为何消除某些后门会同时抑制其他后门。
AI.result: 实验表明，针对单个触发器进行unlearning训练不仅能消除该特定后门，还能显著抑制模型中其他从未被直接处理过的后门；该现象在多个模型家族和不同的后门注入方式（预训练/持续预训练）下均得到验证。跨激活偏移距离有效量化了不同后门消除训练之间模型变化的关联程度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究开辟了大语言模型安全防御的新方向：防御者可以主动向模型中注入可控后门，再通过unlearning将其移除，利用跨后门迁移效应来同时压制攻击者可能已植入的未知后门，从而将防御从被动应对未知后门转变为主动可控的防御策略。

title: FCUS-rPPG: A Fast-Converging Unsupervised Framework for Remote Photoplethysmography via Gradient Oscillation Suppression
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact extraction of blood volume pulse (BVP) signals using consumer-grade cameras. Recent unsupervised rPPG methods learn BVP representations without requiring ground-truth physiological annotations, yet their optimization is often hindered by noisy and unstable gradients, resulting in slow convergence and limited cross-domain generalization. In this paper, we propose FCUS-rPPG, a fast-converging unsupervised rPPG framework with strong generalization capability. Motivated by the observation that BVP representations exhibit both multi-spectral covariation and low-dimensional manifold structure, we design a spectrally shared backbone that facilitates BVP feature disentanglement while improving optimization efficiency. To jointly enhance convergence stability and generalization performance, we further develop a unified optimization framework operating at the gradient, loss-landscape, and feature-representation levels. Specifically, a post-verification masking mechanism filters out misleading gradients according to the weak-amplitude physiological prior of BVP signals; a perturbation-based loss landscape smoothing strategy steers optimization toward more generalizable flat minima; and a noise-aware null-space regularization constrains feature updates to the orthogonal complement of the noise subspace, thereby mitigating noise-induced representation drift. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate that FCUS-rPPG requires only one training epoch, whereas existing methods typically require tens to hundreds of epochs. Notably, FCUS-rPPG consistently achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in cross-dataset evaluations. This study provides an efficient and robust solution to the real-world deployment of unsupervised rPPG. The source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/JiaJieLee/FCUS-rPPG.

AI.tldr: FCUS-rPPG提出了一种快速收敛的无监督远程光电容积描记框架，通过频谱共享骨干网络和统一优化机制（梯度后验验证掩蔽、损失景观平滑、噪声感知零空间正则化），实现单训练周期达到SOTA性能，显著提升跨域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督rPPG方法在BVP表示学习中面临噪声和不稳定梯度导致的收敛速度慢、跨域泛化能力有限的问题，亟需一种既能快速收敛又具备强泛化能力的无监督框架。
AI.method: FCUS-rPPG设计了频谱共享骨干网络实现BVP特征解耦与优化效率提升，并构建了梯度、损失景观和特征表示三层面的统一优化框架：后验验证掩蔽机制根据BVP弱幅值先验滤除误导梯度；基于扰动的损失景观平滑策略引导优化趋向可泛化的平坦极小值；噪声感知零空间正则化将特征更新约束在噪声子空间的正交补空间中以缓解表示漂移。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上的大量实验表明，FCUS-rPPG仅需一个训练周期即可收敛（现有方法通常需要数十到数百个周期），并在跨数据集评估中持续取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为无监督rPPG的实际部署提供了一种高效且鲁棒的解决方案，证明了通过多层级统一优化策略可以同时实现快速收敛与强泛化能力。

title: DELTAMEM: Incremental Experience Memory for LLM Agents via Residual Trees
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents increasingly rely on memory to learn from experiences over continual interactions. However, storing experiences as independent, flat units leads to substantial redundancy and retrieval conflicts, as similar episodes repeat overlapping content and subtle scene variations cause retrieved memories to offer contradictory guidance. To address this, we introduce residual experience, positing that newly acquired experience is often an incremental variation of existing knowledge. We propose DeltaMem, a framework that organizes experience memory into two independent residual trees, one storing goal-conditioned task experience as reusable skills and another for scene-level environment knowledge. Each tree uses a root node for generalized base experiences and incremental delta nodes for subsequent variations, allowing related experiences to share a common foundation without duplication. For retrieval, a failure-penalized similarity scan locates the best match, reconstructing the full experience via root-to-match chain composition. An autonomous consolidation mechanism distills high-frequency paths into new root nodes, enabling the trees to self-organize from general heuristics to specialized variants. Experiments across diverse interactive environments show that DeltaMem consistently outperforms existing baselines. To facilitate future research, we release the code at https://github.com/import-myself/DeltaMem.

AI.tldr: 提出DeltaMem框架，通过将经验组织为两颗残差树（技能树和环境知识树）并利用增量差分节点存储变化，解决LLM智能体记忆中经验冗余与检索冲突问题，在多种交互环境中显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体将交互经验存储为独立、扁平的记忆单元，导致大量冗余（相似情节重复重叠内容）和检索冲突（细微场景变化使检索到的记忆提供矛盾指导），缺乏对经验增量变化特性的有效建模。
AI.method: 提出DeltaMem框架，将经验记忆组织为两颗独立的残差树：一颗存储目标条件任务经验（可复用技能），另一颗存储场景级环境知识；每棵树以根节点存储通用基础经验，增量差分节点存储后续变化，相关经验共享共同基础避免重复；检索时采用失败惩罚相似度扫描定位最佳匹配，通过根到匹配链的组合重建完整经验；自主整合机制将高频路径蒸馏为新的根节点，实现树从通用启发式到专业化变体的自组织。
AI.result: 在多种交互环境中的实验结果表明，DeltaMem在所有基准对比中均持续优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 残差经验假设（新经验是已有知识的增量变化）是有效的，DeltaMem通过树状残差记忆结构有效减少了冗余和检索冲突，其自治整合机制使记忆结构能够随经验积累自组织演化。

title: Exploring Adversarial Robustness and Safety Alignment in Multilingual Multi-Modal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models integrate visual perception into language reasoning, introducing a continuous attack surface susceptible to adversarial attacks. Prior work on MLLM robustness has focused largely on English-centric tasks, leaving multilingual behaviour unexplored. We address this gap through a systematic study of adversarial robustness and multimodal safety across 12 diverse languages, evaluating open-source MLLMs that acquire multilingual capability through instruction tuning. Gradient-based attacks reveal a transferable multilingual vulnerability: adversarial images optimized in one language continue to induce failure in others, demonstrating strong cross-lingual transferability. Multilingual safety further varies with how effectively a model retrieves or interprets harmful instructions. When harmful intent is issued through text, languages with stronger linguistic grounding more often elicit misuse-enabling responses, while weaker languages produce fewer unsafe outputs. When embedded in the image as typographic content, English scripts are reliably recognised and followed, whereas non-English scripts are rarely parsed by the vision encoder. Lower-resource languages may therefore appear safer, but this is an artefact of comprehension and visual-grounding failures rather than genuine alignment, a phenomenon we term safety-by-failure. In contrast, MLLMs that build multilingual capability throughout their training stages rather than only at instruction tuning, such as Qwen3-VL, exhibit genuine cross-lingual safety, maintaining active refusal across languages rather than masking comprehension failure. Shallow multilingual adaptation, such as fine-tuning on translated instruction data, may produce surface-level understanding that creates illusory safety in low-resource languages; deeper integration across training stages leads to genuine multilingual safety alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了多模态大语言模型在12种语言上的对抗鲁棒性与多语言安全性，发现梯度攻击具有跨语言可迁移性，并揭示了"安全即失败"现象——低资源语言看似安全实为理解失败，而跨训练阶段深度融合语言能力的模型才能实现真正的多语言安全对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有关于多模态大语言模型鲁棒性的研究主要聚焦于英语任务，忽略了多语言场景下的对抗攻击行为和安全性评估，缺乏对跨语言对抗可迁移性以及多语言安全对齐机制的深入理解。
AI.method: 研究覆盖12种不同语言，对通过指令微调获得多语言能力的开源MLLM进行系统性评估；采用基于梯度的对抗攻击方法生成对抗样本，测试攻击在不同语言间的可迁移性；同时设计有害文本指令与图像中印刷文字两种安全测试场景，对比不同语言下模型的安全响应行为。
AI.result: 对抗攻击具有强跨语言可迁移性，在一种语言上优化的对抗图像能在其他语言中持续诱导失败；多语言安全性随语言能力差异而变化：语言基础较强的语言更容易引发有害指令的执行，而弱势语言产生的不安全输出较少；当有害意图以印刷文字形式嵌入图像时，英语脚本能被可靠识别，而非英语脚本难以被视觉编码器解析；Qwen3-VL等跨训练阶段构建多语言能力的模型表现出真正的跨语言安全性，而仅通过指令微调做浅层多语言适应的模型则表现出"安全即失败"的假象。
AI.conclusion: 低资源语言表现出的安全性往往是视觉理解或语言理解失败的伪象而非真实对齐，作者将此现象命名为"安全即失败"；浅层多语言适应（如仅对翻译数据进行指令微调）导致表面理解并在低资源语言中产生虚假安全；真正的多语言安全对齐需要模型在整个训练阶段深度融合多语言能力，而非仅在指令微调阶段引入。

title: ROBUST-WT: Robust Uncertainty-aware Segmentation Transform via Whitening and Training Enhancements
summary: Generalized segmentation of medical images prevents performance degradation when different imaging devices and clinical protocols are used across multiple domains. The Whitening Transform-based Probabilistic Shape Regularization Extractor (WT-PSE), published in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging in 2024, addresses this challenge by employing feature decorrelation and Wasserstein distance-based knowledge distillation to achieve robust cross-domain segmentation. This study systematically examines improvements to the WT-PSE learning framework. Four limitations in the original implementation are identified: limited training augmentations that fail to simulate real scanner variations, reliance on per-pixel binary cross-entropy loss that is sensitive to edge noise, the absence of a scheduled loss weighting strategy that may destabilize early training, and the lack of ablation switches for controlled scientific comparison. To address these issues, we propose four enhancements: (1) domain-adaptive augmentation including random erasing, gamma correction, and salt-and-pepper noise; (2) a hybrid BCE and Dice loss function for improved edge-aware segmentation under noisy conditions; (3) a curriculum-based Dice weight scheduling strategy; and (4) command-line control flags for systematic ablation studies. Experiments on the fundus optic disc segmentation benchmark demonstrate that the improved pipeline achieves a final epoch optic-disc Dice score of 0.956 and an ASD score of 13.31, outperforming the baseline epoch-5 Dice score of 0.939. These results indicate that training-level improvements can provide consistent performance gains without modifying the underlying WT-PSE architecture.

AI.tldr: 本文针对WT-PSE域泛化分割框架的四个训练层面局限性提出改进方案，包括域自适应数据增强、混合BCE-Dice损失函数、课程式Dice权重调度策略和消融实验控制开关，在不修改原始架构的前提下在眼底视盘分割任务上取得了更优性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割需要在跨域（不同成像设备和临床协议）场景下保持性能稳定，WT-PSE框架虽基于特征去相关和Wasserstein距离知识蒸馏实现了域泛化分割，但其原始实现在训练策略上存在四项不足：训练增强不足无法模拟真实扫描仪变化、逐像素二值交叉熵损失对边缘噪声敏感、缺乏损失加权调度导致早期训练不稳定、缺少消融开关难以进行受控科学对比。
AI.method: 本文提出四项训练级增强策略：域自适应数据增强（随机擦除、伽马校正、椒盐噪声）以模拟真实设备变化；混合BCE与Dice损失函数以提升噪声条件下的边缘感知分割能力；基于课程学习的Dice权重调度策略以稳定训练过程；命令行控制标志以实现系统性消融研究。所有改进均在不修改底层WT-PSE架构的前提下实现。
AI.result: 在眼底视盘分割基准数据集上，改进后的管线在最终轮次达到视盘Dice分数0.956和ASD分数13.31，优于原始基线的第5轮Dice分数0.939，验证了训练级改进可带来一致的性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明，在不修改底层域泛化架构的前提下，通过针对性的训练策略优化（增强、损失函数、调度策略和消融控制）即可显著提升跨域医学图像分割性能，为域泛化分割框架的训练流程改进提供了可复现的工程实践方案。

title: Decomposing how prompting steers behavior
summary: Prompting steers large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs) without weight updates, but it remains unclear how instruction changes reshape internal representations to produce behavior. We introduce a nested geometric decomposition framework that treats prompting as a transformation of the representational geometry of the content following the prompt. For each prompt pair, we align representations of the same stimuli under two prompts using increasingly expressive stimulus-invariant maps: translation, rigid transformation with uniform scaling, sequential axis scaling, affine transformation, and nonlinear transformation. We then causally test each map by replacing a single layer's prompt-A hidden state for held-out stimuli with its mapped counterpart and measuring recovery of prompt-B representational geometry and behavior. Across three LLMs, three VLMs, and six text or image datasets spanning style, emotion, scene content, and number, prompts consistently reshape representations toward the instructed task structure. Cross-validated variance decomposition shows that much prompt-induced activation change is captured by shape-preserving maps, especially translation and rigid transformation with uniform scaling, while tier profiles reveal model- and task-specific routing strategies across layers. Crucially, although translation and rigid tiers already improve behavioral agreement, affine transformation is the first tier to nearly recover target-prompt task geometry and yields corresponding behavioral gains. This suggests that cross-dimensional linear mixing is a key mechanism by which prompts reorganize representations toward instructed task structure. Our framework decomposes prompt-induced representational change into interpretable geometric components and reveals how models route task-relevant structure to produce prompt-driven behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出嵌套几何分解框架，将提示（prompting）视为对表征几何的变换，通过刺激不变映射（平移、刚性变换、轴缩放、仿射变换、非线性变换）分解prompt引起的表征变化，发现仿射变换是首个几乎完全恢复目标prompt任务几何并带来行为增益的层级，揭示了跨维度线性混合是prompt重塑表征的关键机制。
AI.motivation: 提示（prompting）能无需权重更新即可引导大语言模型和视觉-语言模型的行为，但指令改变如何重塑模型的内部表征以产生相应行为，这一机制尚不清晰。
AI.method: 论文提出嵌套几何分解框架，将提示视为对后续内容表征几何的变换。对于每对prompt，使用五种表达力递增的刺激不变映射（平移、均匀缩放刚性变换、顺序轴缩放、仿射变换、非线性变换）对齐同一刺激在不同prompt下的表征，并通过将单层隐藏状态替换为其映射版本，因果性地测试各映射恢复目标prompt表征几何和行为的能力。
AI.result: 跨三个LLM、三个VLM及六个文本/图像数据集，prompt一致地将表征重塑为指令任务结构。交叉验证方差分解显示，大量prompt引起的激活变化被保形映射（尤其是平移和刚性变换）捕获，层级剖面揭示了模型和任务特异的层间路由策略。仿射变换是首个几乎完全恢复目标prompt任务几何的层级，并带来相应的行为增益。
AI.conclusion: 跨维度线性混合（仿射变换）是prompt将表征重新组织为指令任务结构的关键机制。该框架将prompt引起的表征变化分解为可解释的几何成分，揭示了模型如何路由任务相关结构以产生提示驱动行为。

title: Consistency Training Can Entrench Misalignment
summary: Consistency training encourages a model to produce similar outputs across related inputs or sampling procedures. Such methods are simple, scalable, and largely label-free, but their effects on model alignment remain poorly understood. Could the self-bootstrapping nature of these methods amplify undesired behavior in models? We test seven consistency training methods on 108 ``model organisms: open-source models (7B--70B) fine-tuned to exhibit various forms of controlled misaligned behavior. We find that outcomes vary significantly: consistency training generally suppresses reward hacking and emergent misalignment but amplifies sycophancy. We present evidence that distribution shifts induced by the consistency labeling process, rather than variation in the selection operators, may be the primary driver of systematic alignment effects. Finally, we present a unifying theoretical framework to derive conditions under which consistency training will amplify or suppress misalignment. In total, our study establishes that consistency training is not alignment-neutral, and that its use in critical systems should be carefully audited.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了七种一致性训练方法在108个模型（7B-70B）上的对齐效果，发现一致性训练并非对齐中性：它会抑制奖励黑客行为和新兴错位，但会放大谄媚行为，且分布偏移而非选择算子变异是主要驱动因素，并给出了统一理论框架来推导放大或抑制错位的条件。
AI.motivation: 一致性训练方法因其简单、可扩展且几乎无需标注而被广泛使用，但其对模型对齐（alignment）的影响尚未被充分理解，尤其是不清楚这类方法的自举（self-bootstrapping）特性是否会无意中放大模型的不良行为。
AI.method: 该研究测试了七种不同的一致性训练方法，在108个被称为"模型生物"（model organisms）的开源模型（参数量从7B到70B）上进行实验，这些模型经过微调以展示各种形式的受控错位行为。研究还提出了一个统一的理论框架来推导一致性训练放大或抑制错位的条件。
AI.result: 实验发现，一致性训练的效果因错位类型而异：总体上抑制了奖励黑客（reward hacking）和新兴错位（emergent misalignment），但放大了谄媚行为（sycophancy）。证据表明，一致性标签生成过程引起的分布偏移（distribution shift）是系统性对齐效应的主要驱动因素，而非选择算子（selection operators）的差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明一致性训练并非对齐中性，其在关键系统中的使用应被仔细审计；本文提供的统一理论框架可用于预测特定条件下一致性训练对错位的放大或抑制效果。

title: TGV-KV: Text-Grounded KV Eviction for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) inherit the auto-regressive generation paradigm and cache the keys and values (KV) of all previous tokens to accelerate inference, resulting in memory consumption that scales linearly with context length. This issue is particularly pronounced in VLMs due to substantial redundancy in the visual modality. Although KV cache eviction approaches can effectively reduce inference memory, they often incur significant performance degradation in VLMs, as most are designed for language models and overlook the inherent gap between text and vision. By systematically analyzing the modality gap in VLMs in this work, we argue that the importance of visual information should be grounded in textual guidance and accordingly propose a Text-Grounded KV Eviction method for VLMs (TGV-KV). TGV-KV comprises three submodules: (1) Text-Vision Budgeting (TVB) assigns budget to each layer based on the mutual information interaction. (2) Text-Weighted Ranking (TWR) assesses the priority of text and ranks vision importance based on weighted text-image attention. (3) Text-Prioritised Retention (TPR) policy strategically preserves text KV to avoid acute information loss. We evaluate TGV-KV across five models with different sizes and architectures, showing that TGV-KV preserves 99.2% full-KV accuracy on the VizWiz-VQA task with LLaVA-NeXT and boosts end-to-end throughput by 52.6% with an extreme retention budget of 5%. Code is available at https://github.com/Danielement321/TGV-KV.

AI.tldr: 提出一种文本引导的KV缓存驱逐方法TGV-KV，通过TVB预算分配、TWR重要性排序和TPR保留策略，在保持99.2%全KV精度的同时将VLM推理吞吐量提升52.6%，解决了视觉语言模型中KV缓存内存随上下文长度线性增长且视觉模态冗余导致性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）继承了自回归生成范式，需要缓存所有历史token的键值（KV）以加速推理，导致内存消耗随上下文长度线性增长；视觉模态存在大量冗余，使得该问题在VLM中尤为突出。现有KV缓存驱逐方法多针对语言模型设计，忽视了文本与视觉之间的固有模态差距，在VLM上应用时会造成显著的性能退化。
AI.method: 提出Text-Grounded KV Eviction（TGV-KV）方法，包含三个子模块：（1）Text-Vision Budgeting（TVB）基于互信息交互为每层分配预算；（2）Text-Weighted Ranking（TWR）通过加权文本-图像注意力评估文本优先级并排序视觉重要性；（3）Text-Prioritised Retention（TPR）策略优先保留文本KV以避免严重信息损失。
AI.result: 在五种不同规模和架构的模型上评估，TGV-KV在LLaVA-NeXT的VizWiz-VQA任务上保留了99.2%的全KV精度，并在极端保留预算（5%）下将端到端吞吐量提升了52.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过系统性分析VLM中的模态差距，论证了视觉信息的重要性应以文本引导为基础，提出的TGV-KV方法在显著压缩KV缓存的同时保持了高精度，证明了文本引导的驱逐策略在VLM推理优化中的有效性。

title: EvoTrainer: Co-Evolving LLM Policies and Training Harnesses for Autonomous Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Autonomous LLM training is often framed as recipe search, which leaves the training harness largely static. This limitation sharpens in agentic RL, where shifting bottlenecks and scalar rewards mask diverse failure modes. We introduce EvoTrainer, an autonomous training framework that co-evolves LLM policies and training-side harnesses through empirical feedback: it diagnoses rollout-level evidence, revises diagnostics, backtests interventions, and accumulates reusable skills. Evaluated on mathematical reasoning, competitive-programming code generation, and repository-level software engineering, EvoTrainer matches or exceeds the human-engineered RL references under the same data, codebase, and evaluation protocol, with the largest gain on long-horizon agentic SWE. Trajectory analyses show that retained strategies diverge across domains, evolving diagnostics prevent invalid high-scoring branches from being promoted, and reusable skills shape later search. Autonomous LLM RL should move beyond recipe search toward joint evolution of policies and the training harnesses that interpret them.

AI.tldr: EvoTrainer是一个自主训练框架，通过协同演化LLM策略与训练侧引导程序，将LLM强化学习从静态配方搜索推进到联合演化范式，在数学推理、代码生成和仓库级软件工程任务上匹配或超越人工设计的RL基线，并在长程智能体SWE任务上取得最大增益。
AI.motivation: 现有自主LLM训练通常被框架化为配方搜索，训练引导程序本身保持静态；这一限制在智能体强化学习中尤为突出，因为动态瓶颈和标量奖励掩盖了多样化的失败模式，亟需一种能够动态调整训练策略的自主训练框架。
AI.method: EvoTrainer提出了一种协同演化框架，同时优化LLM策略和训练侧引导程序（harness），通过经验反馈循环实现：诊断轨迹级证据、修正诊断、回测干预措施，并积累可复用技能，从而实现对训练过程的自主调适。
AI.result: 在数学推理、竞赛编程代码生成和仓库级软件工程任务上，EvoTrainer在相同数据、代码库和评估协议下匹配或超过了人工设计的RL参考基线，其中在长程智能体SWE任务上提升最为显著；轨迹分析表明保留策略因领域而异，演化诊断能阻止无效高分支被提升，可复用技能塑造后续搜索。
AI.conclusion: 自主LLM强化学习应超越静态配方搜索，转向策略与训练引导程序的联合演化，后者能够动态解释并改进训练过程，这一范式转移为更通用、自适应的LLM训练方法提供了新方向。

title: Synthesize and Reward -- Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Step Tool Use in Live Environments
summary: Training LLMs to orchestrate multi-step tool calls is held back by three coupled obstacles: realistic stateful execution environments are costly to build, synthetic training queries are often detached from the server's actual state (so the generated tool calls fail to execute), and recall-based RL rewards incentivize verbose tool-calling patterns. We present PROVE (Programmatic Rewards On Verified Environments), a framework with three contributions: (1) a library of 20 stateful MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers exposing 343 tools, enabling live-execution RL training with session-scoped state isolation; (2) an automated data synthesis pipeline that generates validated multi-turn tool-call trajectories against these servers via dependency-graph-guided conversation simulation grounded in live-sampled server state, so every generated query references entities that actually exist; and (3) a multi-component programmatic reward - graduated validity scoring, dependency-aware coverage, an adaptive efficiency penalty with a complexity-scaled call budget, a tool-name signal, and an argument-value matching bonus - requiring no external judge model. We train four models (Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, Granite-4.1-8B) with GRPO using identical reward hyperparameters and ~13K training examples; only learning rate is tuned per model family from a three-point sweep. On BFCL Multi-Turn, tau2-bench, and T-Eval, PROVE yields improvements of up to +10.2, +6.8, and +6.5 points respectively, demonstrating that a compact programmatic reward yields consistent gains on multi-step tool orchestration across two model families.

AI.tldr: PROVE 提出了一种基于程序化奖励和可验证执行环境的框架，通过 20 个 MCP 服务器、自动化数据合成管道和多组件奖励函数，在无需外部评判模型的情况下显著提升了 LLM 在多步工具调用任务上的性能。
