AI.motivation: 当前训练 LLM 进行多步工具调用面临三个耦合障碍：构建真实的状态化执行环境成本高昂，合成训练查询常脱离服务器实际状态导致生成的工具调用无法执行，以及基于回忆的 RL 奖励会鼓励冗长的工具调用模式。
AI.method: PROVE 框架包含三个核心贡献：(1) 一个包含 20 个状态化 MCP 服务器（暴露 343 个工具）的库，支持具有会话级状态隔离的实时执行 RL 训练；(2) 一个自动化数据合成管道，通过基于依赖图引导的对话模拟生成经过验证的多轮工具调用轨迹，确保每个查询引用真实存在的实体；(3) 一个多组件程序化奖励函数，包括渐进式有效性评分、依赖感知覆盖率、自适应效率惩罚（带有复杂度缩放调用预算）、工具名称信号和参数值匹配奖励，无需外部评判模型。
AI.result: 使用 GRPO 训练了四种模型（Qwen3-4B、Qwen3-8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Granite-4.1-8B），使用相同的奖励超参数和约 13K 训练样本，仅对学习率进行三值扫描调优。在 BFCL Multi-Turn、tau2-bench 和 T-Eval 上，PROVE 分别取得了最高 +10.2、+6.8 和 +6.5 个百分点的改进。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，紧凑的程序化奖励函数能够在两个模型族上对多步工具编排任务产生一致的性能提升，验证了基于可验证环境的程序化奖励能够有效替代外部评判模型，为 LLM 工具调用训练提供了一种可扩展且高效的解决方案。

title: Zero-Shot 3D Question Answering via Hierarchical View-to-Token Transportation
summary: Recently, zero-shot 3D scene understanding via 2D Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has gained increasing research interest due to their promising spatial reasoning capabilities. Typically, multiple 2D views are sampled from a 3D point cloud and fed into pre-trained VLMs to answer a given question. This paradigm highlights the critical role of input context quality and raises the challenge of retaining as many task-relevant 3D details as possible under a limited input budget. We propose \texttt{KeyVT}, a hierarchical approach for input context collection at both the view and token levels. Specifically, we combine pixel features with camera parameters and assess view importance based on both semantic content and geometric position, resulting in spatially consistent and task-relevant views. Furthermore, we address redundancy among patches across selected views by identifying representative tokens under the optimal transport (OT) framework, where view tokens and key tokens are formulated as two discrete distributions in the embedding space. These key tokens are expected to cover all view features by minimizing the OT distance. We evaluate our framework on three widely used benchmarks, demonstrating significant improvements over existing tuning-free methods and performance comparable to training-based approaches.

AI.tldr: KeyVT提出了一种层次化的输入上下文收集方法，在视图级和令牌级分别进行选择与压缩，通过结合语义与几何信息的视角评估及基于最优传输的关键令牌识别，在零样本3D场景理解任务中显著超越现有无调优方法，并达到与有调优方法相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于2D视觉语言模型（VLM）的零样本3D场景理解方法通常从3D点云中采样多个2D视图并输入预训练VLM，但受限于输入预算，如何高效保留尽可能多的任务相关3D细节成为一个关键挑战，现有方法在视图选择与信息压缩方面仍存在不足。
AI.method: KeyVT提出了一种层次化方法，在视图级和令牌级两级进行输入上下文收集。在视图级，将像素特征与相机参数结合，基于语义内容和几何位置共同评估视图重要性，从而选择空间一致且任务相关的视图。在令牌级，针对所选视图中补丁之间的冗余问题，将视图令牌与关键令牌建模为嵌入空间中的两个离散分布，并在最优传输框架下通过最小化OT距离来识别能覆盖所有视图特征的代表性关键令牌。
AI.result: 在三个广泛使用的基准数据集上，KeyVT相比现有无调优方法取得了显著改进，且性能与需要额外训练的方法相当，验证了其在零样本3D场景理解任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，通过层次化的视图选择与令牌压缩策略，可以在有限输入预算下有效保留任务相关的3D细节，从而大幅提升基于2D VLM的零样本3D场景理解性能，为无调优条件下的3D视觉推理提供了新的思路。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Clarification in LLM Agents with Information Gain
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents often operate under underspecified user instructions, where latent uncertainty over user intent leads to erroneous tool actions. To address this challenge, we propose a goal-oriented clarification framework that aligns clarification behavior with ambiguity resolution. Central to our approach is the Information Gain Reward, a metric that quantifies the utility of clarification questions by measuring the Bayesian belief update towards the ground-truth goal induced by the clarification exchange. We train the clarifier (LLM) using this reward to optimize for high information gain, ensuring that clarifications effectively reduce uncertainty and improve task completion within the agent-tool-user environment. We validate our framework within a clarification-enhanced $τ$-Bench environment, conducting cross-agent evaluations across five heterogeneous backbones. Empirical results demonstrate that our method consistently improves the success rate by 3.7\% over the no-clarification baseline, while adding only 0.3 total interaction steps on average.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于信息增益奖励的目标导向澄清框架，通过训练LLM智能体生成高信息增益的澄清问题，在τ-Bench环境中以仅增加0.3次交互步骤的代价将任务成功率提升3.7%。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体经常在用户指令不明确（underspecified）的情况下运行，潜在的用户意图不确定性会导致工具调用错误，现有方法缺乏有效的机制来量化澄清行为对消除歧义的实际效用。
AI.method: 提出目标导向的澄清框架，核心是信息增益奖励（Information Gain Reward），通过衡量澄清对话前后对真实用户目标的贝叶斯信念更新来量化澄清问题的效用；利用该奖励训练LLM澄清器，使其优化高信息增益的澄清行为以降低不确定性并提升任务完成率。
AI.result: 在增强澄清功能的τ-Bench环境中进行跨5种异构骨干网络的智能体评估，该方法相较于无澄清基线一致地提升了3.7%的成功率，且平均仅增加0.3次总交互步骤。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，基于信息增益的奖励机制能够有效引导LLM智能体在任务执行中主动进行高效的澄清，以极小交互代价显著提升任务成功率，为构建更鲁棒的用户意图推理框架提供了可行方向。

title: Disentangling Visual and Factual Correctness in LVLMs' Visualization Literacy
comment: Under review at IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG). 23 pages, 9 figures
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) show strong visualization interpretation, yet it is unclear whether their responses reflect genuine reasoning over visual evidence or factual priors learned during training. Current evaluations mix these two sources, obscuring when correct visual interpretation is overridden by memorized facts. We present a framework that isolates visual correctness from factual correctness, revealing validity limitations in existing visualization literacy assessments. Across three experiments with 15 state-of-the-art LVLMs: (1) several models reach human-level performance on standard tests (VLAT), but this may reflect factual recall rather than visual understanding, while randomized-data tests (reVLAT) underestimate literacy when correct visual interpretation is superseded by factual priors. (2) Using our Counterfactual Visualization Literacy Assessment Test (CVLAT) with capability-normalized arbitration metrics, we classify models by the sign of their visual-factual reliance index (VFRI), revealing a visualization-oriented majority and a factual knowledge-oriented minority, though several near-zero cases warrant caution. A human baseline (N=30) on the same counterfactual items confirms that people overwhelmingly follow the chart under conflict, providing a human reference point. (3) Prompt-based intervention can shift prioritization, but its effectiveness is highly model-dependent and direction-asymmetric, and high chart-reading capability does not predict prompt-controllability. Overall, high visualization accuracy is not sufficient evidence of faithful visual reasoning: reliable integration into visual analytics requires evaluating not only visualization literacy but also how models arbitrate between visual evidence and factual priors when the two diverge. Benchmark and code: https://github.com/JaeyoungKim-HCIL/CVLAT

AI.tldr: 提出Counterfactual Visualization Literacy Assessment Test (CVLAT)框架，揭示大型视觉-语言模型(LVLM)在可视化理解任务中可能依赖事实先验而非真实视觉推理；通过视觉-事实依赖指数(VFRI)对15个模型进行分类，发现多数模型偏向视觉证据，但部分模型依赖事实知识，且高可视化准确率并不保证可靠的视觉推理。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLM可视化理解评估无法区分模型回答是基于视觉证据的真实推理还是源于训练中学习的事实先验，导致评估结果混淆了视觉正确性与事实正确性，无法揭示模型在视觉证据与记忆事实冲突时的真实行为。
AI.method: 构建了CVLAT框架，使用反事实可视化项目分离视觉正确性与事实正确性；提出能力归一化的仲裁指标视觉-事实依赖指数(VFRI)，依据模型在视觉与事实冲突时的回答倾向进行分类；并引入提示干预实验检验模型的可控性。
AI.result: 在15个SOTA LVLM上的三组实验表明：(1)部分模型在标准VLAT测试中达到人类水平，但可能归因于事实回忆而非视觉理解，而随机化数据测试(reVLAT)在视觉正确被事实先验覆盖时会低估能力；(2)VFRI分类显示多数模型为可视化导向型，少数为事实知识导向型，若干模型接近阈值需谨慎；(3)提示干预可改变优先级但效果高度依赖模型且方向不对称，高图表阅读能力不预测提示可控性。
AI.conclusion: 高可视化准确率不足以证明忠实的视觉推理；可靠地将LVLM集成到可视化分析中，不仅需要评估可视化素养，更需要评估模型在视觉证据与事实先验冲突时的仲裁机制。

title: Think-Before-Speak: From Internal Evaluation to Public Expression in Multi-Agent Social Simulation
summary:
LLM-based multi-agent simulation offers a promising way to study social interaction, deliberation, and collective opinion dynamics. However, many existing dialogue simulation frameworks represent interaction mainly as observable turn exchange or aggregated outputs, leaving the internal evaluative processes behind silence, speaking intention, and public expression difficult to examine. We introduce TBS (Think-Before-Speak), an interval-based multi-agent simulation framework that separates agents' private reasoning from public utterance generation. At each interval, all agents update structured internal states based on the shared dialogue history and their own memory. These states include dissonance-related appraisal, perceived opinion climate, perceived isolation risk, response strategy, and willingness to speak. The orchestrator then resolves competing speaking intentions and commits one utterance to the public dialogue, allowing internal evaluation and public interaction to co-evolve over time.
  We evaluate TBS in simulated town hall discussions on a climate-related policy issue. Results show that TBS produces coherent internal-state traces and that these traces vary systematically across turn-allocation, silence, and memory conditions. Dissonance-related appraisal increases agents' willingness to speak, whereas silence-pressure appraisal decreases it. Once speaking intention is formed, public expression is shaped mainly by turn-allocation rules. These findings suggest that TBS supports mechanism-sensitive social simulation by making the pathway from internal evaluation to public expression observable and analyzable.

AI.tldr: 提出TBS（Think-Before-Speak）框架，一种基于时间间隔的多智能体仿真方法，通过将智能体的内部评估过程（认知失调、意见气候感知、沉默压力等）与公开话语生成分离，使得从内部评价到公共表达的路径变得可观察、可分析。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体对话仿真框架主要关注公开的对话轮次交换或聚合输出，忽略了智能体在沉默、发言意图和公开表达背后的内部评估过程，使得内部评价机制难以被直接观察和分析。
AI.method: 提出TBS（Think-Before-Speak）框架，采用基于时间间隔的多智能体仿真设计，将智能体的私人推理与公开话语生成相分离。在每个时间间隔内，所有智能体基于共享对话历史和个人记忆更新内部状态（包括认知失调评估、感知的意见气候、感知的孤立风险、响应策略和发言意愿），由编排器（orchestrator）解析竞争的发言意图并选择一个话语提交到公共对话中，使得内部评估与公开交互随时间共同演化。
AI.result: 在关于气候政策的模拟镇议会讨论中，TBS生成了连贯的内部状态轨迹，且这些轨迹在轮次分配、沉默和记忆条件下呈现系统性的变化。认知失调评估增强了智能体的发言意愿，而沉默压力评估则降低了发言意愿；一旦发言意图形成，公开表达主要由轮次分配规则决定。
AI.conclusion: TBS支持机制敏感的社会仿真，通过将内部评估到公开表达的路径变得可观察和可分析，为研究复杂社会互动中的意见动态提供了新的方法论工具。

title: $A^2$: Smaller Self-Supervised ViTs Localize Better than Larger Ones
summary: Robust visual classification often depends on localizing the main foreground objects in an image while ignoring contextual distractors. Surprisingly, we find that the attention maps of smaller self-supervised ViTs localize foreground objects better than those of larger ViTs. However, we still need large ViTs, because they extract richer representations from each patch. To get the best of both worlds, good localization and rich representations, we propose $A^2$, a simple method that leverages this inverse scaling finding by decoupling where to look (a small attention model) from what to extract (a large embedding model): we crop around the attention peaks of a small model and embed the crops with a larger model. $A^2$ uses entirely pretrained features, requires no group labels, and does not require per-dataset attention or backbone training. Across 5 benchmarks, $A^2$ is competitive with backbone-matched loss-level methods like DFR, and outperforms end-to-end attention training under stronger distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文发现小型自监督ViT的注意力图比大型ViT更能准确定位前景物体，并提出A²方法，通过解耦“定位”（小模型注意力）与“特征提取”（大模型嵌入），在无需额外训练的情况下实现鲁棒的视觉分类，在多个分布偏移基准上达到或超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常认为大型ViT能够提取更丰富的语义特征，但本文发现它们在定位前景物体方面反而不如小型自监督ViT。因此，如何在保持大型模型丰富表征能力的同时，利用小型模型的优异定位能力，成为一个亟待解决的研究问题。
AI.method: 本文提出A²方法，将“定位”（where to look）与“特征提取”（what to extract）解耦：首先使用一个小型自监督ViT的注意力图定位显著前景区域，裁剪出注意力峰值附近的图像块，然后使用一个大型ViT对这些裁剪区域进行特征嵌入。该方法完全基于预训练特征，无需组标签，也不需要针对每个数据集微调注意力或骨干网络。
AI.result: 在5个基准数据集上，A²方法与使用骨干网络匹配的损失级方法（如DFR）性能相当，并在更强的分布偏移场景下优于端到端的注意力训练方法，验证了其在不同分布偏移程度下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了一个反直觉的“逆缩放”现象：小型ViT在定位前景物体上优于大型ViT。A²方法通过解耦定位与特征提取，以简单有效的方式兼顾了两者的优势，表明在视觉分类中可以利用预训练模型的内在注意力特性而不必进行额外的训练或标注，为鲁棒视觉识别提供了新思路。

title: ClinicalMC: A Benchmark for Multi-Course Clinical Decision-Making with Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been widely adopted in healthcare, yet they still encounter significant challenges in complex clinical decision-making scenarios. Existing benchmarks primarily assess LLM performance in single-course settings and lack systematic evaluation in multi-course scenarios, where a patient's condition evolves over time. To address this gap, we propose ClinicalMC, a benchmark for multi-course clinical decision-making. It includes 1,275 Chinese and 5,804 English samples across four stages from admission to discharge. These stages cover triage, first-course examination/diagnosis/treatment, subsequent multi-course examination/assessment/treatment, and final diagnosis. In ClinicalMC, patients in the English dataset undergo an average of 5.11 clinical courses, whereas those in the Chinese dataset undergo 3.42. To assess LLM performance, we construct a multi-agent evaluation framework that includes patient, examiner, and doctor agents. Based on the benchmark and framework, we design two experimental settings -- a single-turn static setting and a multi-turn dynamic setting -- and assess three categories of LLMs: 1) closed-source LLMs like GPT5-mini; 2) open-source LLMs like DeepSeek-V3.2; and 3) medical LLMs like HuatuoGPT-o1. Through extensive evaluation, we aim to better understand LLM performance in the medical domain and support its effective deployment in healthcare.

AI.tldr: 提出ClinicalMC基准，用于评估大语言模型在多病程临床决策中的表现，覆盖从入院到出院的多阶段任务，并构建多智能体评估框架进行静态和动态实验。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要评估大语言模型在单病程临床决策中的表现，缺乏对多病程场景——即患者病情随时间演变——的系统评估，无法全面衡量LLM在复杂临床决策中的能力。
AI.method: 构建ClinicalMC基准，包含1,275个中文和5,804个英文样本，覆盖分诊、首诊检查/诊断/治疗、后续多病程检查/评估/治疗、最终诊断四个阶段，英文和中文数据集平均临床病程数分别为5.11和3.42；同时设计多智能体评估框架，包含患者、考官和医生三种智能体，并设置单轮静态和多轮动态两种实验设置，评估闭源LLM（如GPT5-mini）、开源LLM（如DeepSeek-V3.2）和医学LLM（如HuatuoGPT-o1）三类模型。
AI.result: 通过多类别大语言模型在ClinicalMC基准上的广泛评估，系统分析了不同模型在多病程临床决策中的表现差异，为理解LLM在医疗领域的适用性提供了定量依据。
AI.conclusion: ClinicalMC填补了多病程临床决策评估的空白，多智能体框架和动静结合的实验设计为LLM在医疗领域的有效部署提供了更全面的评估方法和实践指导。

title: GLINT: Sparsely Gated Vision-Language Alignment for Fine-Grained Radiology Representations
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) for radiology have emerged as a scalable paradigm by leveraging image-report pairs naturally produced in clinical workflows. However, this pairing reveals a mismatch in scale: each finding occupies only a small region of the image, yet supervision is provided only at the global image-report level. This poses a central challenge: prior approaches spread weight densely across all patches rather than concentrating on the sparse subset relevant to a given query. To address this, we present GLINT (Gated Language-Image alignmeNT), a framework that explicitly models this sparse correspondence. On the alignment side, we introduce Sparsely Gated Alignment, a novel architecture in which a sigmoid gate over a separate gate embedding space activates only the patches relevant to each textual query, enforcing explicit sparsity. On the representation side, we add Dense Feature Regularization, which anchors the trainable encoder's intermediate features to a frozen self-supervised learning (SSL) teacher, preserving the fine-grained patch features that the gate relies on. The same recipe applies to both 2D chest X-ray (CXR) and 3D chest computed tomography (CT), built with DINOv3 and V-JEPA 2.1, respectively. GLINT enables zero-shot classification, grounding, and segmentation from free-text queries, and to our knowledge is the first to demonstrate zero-shot segmentation on 3D CT volumes without mask supervision. Notably, the most pronounced gains arise on zero-shot grounding and segmentation, where sparse, query-specific localization is required, consistent with our design intent. In downstream evaluation, GLINT outperforms both SSL encoders and medical VLMs on classification, report generation, and segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出GLINT框架，通过稀疏门控对齐和密集特征正则化，显式建模视觉-语言间的稀疏对应关系，首次在3D CT体素上实现无掩码监督的零样本分割，并在分类、报告生成和分割任务上超越现有医学VLM和自监督编码器。
AI.motivation: 放射学视觉-语言模型利用临床中自然产生的图像-报告对进行训练，但每个病灶在图像中仅占很小区域而监督信号来自全局图像-报告对，导致尺度失配问题：现有方法将权重密集地分散在所有图像块上，而非集中在与查询相关的稀疏子集上，无法有效建模这种稀疏对应关系。
AI.method: 提出GLINT框架，包含两个核心组件：在对齐方面，引入稀疏门控对齐架构（Sparsely Gated Alignment），通过在独立的门控嵌入空间上使用sigmoid门控激活仅与每个文本查询相关的图像块，强制执行显式稀疏性；在表征方面，加入密集特征正则化（Dense Feature Regularization），将可训练编码器的中间特征锚定到冻结的自监督学习教师模型上，保留门控所依赖的细粒度图像块特征。该方法统一适用于2D胸部X光和3D胸部CT，分别基于DINOv3和V-JEPA 2.1构建。
AI.result: GLINT支持基于自由文本查询的零样本分类、定位和分割，据我们所知是首个在3D CT体素上无需掩码监督实现零样本分割的方法。最显著的提升体现在零样本定位和分割任务上，这与其稀疏查询特定定位的设计目标一致。在下游评估中，GLINT在分类、报告生成和分割任务上均优于自监督编码器和医学VLM。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模视觉-语言间的稀疏对应关系是提升放射学VLM细粒度定位能力的关键，稀疏门控对齐实现了查询相关的局部激活，而密集特征正则化有效保护了底层细粒度特征不被破坏，该框架在2D和3D医学影像上均表现出通用性和有效性。

title: The Reliability Gap in Benchmark Auditing: Distribution Shift and Scale as Failure Modes of Contamination Detection
summary: Benchmark contamination, where evaluation examples appear in a model's training data, threatens the validity of LLM assessment. Statistical tools for detecting training-data membership exist, but have been validated almost exclusively in controlled academic regimes: large, homogeneous pre-training corpora and transparent, single-stage training pipelines. Whether these methods remain reliable in realistic auditing scenarios remains unclear. We identify two under-studied failure modes: distribution shift, which arises when suspect and validation sets violate the IID assumption, and scale constraints, which arise because benchmarks are orders of magnitude smaller than pre-training corpora. We systematically evaluate three leading paradigms: LLM Dataset Inference, Post-Hoc Dataset Inference, and CoDeC across 27 models from multiple families (including Pythia, OLMo~2, and specialised cultural and medical LLMs) and scales (up to 27B). We then further extend our analysis to frontier industry models. Across 335 evaluations, only 199 yield correct outcomes. LLM Dataset Inference results in false positives under distribution shift, Post-Hoc Dataset Inference is underpowered at benchmark scale, and CoDeC provides only coarse provenance signals that are insufficient to verify individual benchmark splits. Our results reveal a systematic reliability gap between controlled validation and practical benchmark auditing, and show that statistical detection cannot yet replace transparent data provenance. We open-source our benchmark for further research.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了三种主流基准污染检测方法在真实审计场景中的可靠性，发现在分布偏移和规模约束下仅有59.7%的评估结果正确，揭示了统计检测方法在实用层面与受控验证之间存在系统性可靠性差距。
AI.motivation: 现有用于检测LLM训练数据中基准污染的统计方法几乎仅在受控学术场景下验证（如同质预训练语料、透明单阶段训练流程），但在真实的审计场景中，分布偏移（怀疑集与验证集违反IID假设）和规模约束（基准数据集远小于预训练语料）这两种未被充分研究的失效模式可能严重影响检测方法的可靠性。
AI.method: 系统评估了三种主流检测范式：LLM Dataset Inference、Post-Hoc Dataset Inference和CoDeC，覆盖Pythia、OLMo 2、专用文化和医疗LLM等27个模型（最高270亿参数），并扩展至前沿工业模型，共进行335项评估。
AI.result: 335项评估中仅199项结果正确（约59.7%）。LLM Dataset Inference在分布偏移下产生假阳性，Post-Hoc Dataset Inference在基准规模下统计功效不足，CoDeC仅能提供粗粒度的来源信号而无法验证单个基准划分。
AI.conclusion: 统计检测方法在受控验证与实际基准审计之间存在系统性可靠性差距，目前尚无法替代透明的数据来源追踪。研究开源了相关基准以推动后续研究。

title: Follow-Your-Preference++: Rethinking Preference Alignment for Image Inpainting
comment: 23 pages, 14 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2509.23082
summary: We study preference alignment for image inpainting. Rather than proposing yet another method, we revisit the problem from first principles and reassess its core challenges. We adopt the widely used direct preference optimization framework and construct preference training data with publicly available reward models. Our empirical study spans nine reward models, two benchmarks, and two baseline inpainting models that differ in architecture and generative mechanism. Our main findings are: (1) Most reward models provide valid signals for preference data construction, although some are unreliable as evaluators. (2) Across models and benchmarks, preference data exhibits consistent trends under both candidate and sample scaling. (3) Reward models display pronounced biases--particularly in brightness, composition, and color scheme--that make them prone to inducing reward hacking. (4) A simple ensemble of reward models mitigates such biases and yields robust, generalizable performance. {\color{rebuttal_blue}(5) Preference alignment is transferable to the object removal task, where the goal shifts from open-ended creative generation to coherent background completion. (6) Further analysis reveals that a calibrated ensemble method further mitigates hacking and improves robustness.} Without modifying model architectures or introducing additional datasets, our models substantially outperform prior state-of-the-art models on standard metrics, large vision-language model evaluations, and human assessments. Our code is available at: https://github.com/shenytzzz/Follow-Your-Preference.

AI.tldr: 本文从第一性原理重新审视图像修复中的偏好对齐问题，采用直接偏好优化框架并结合公开奖励模型构建偏好数据，通过系统性实验揭示了奖励模型的固有偏差与奖励破解风险，并提出简单有效的奖励模型集成方法以获得鲁棒且泛化的性能，在标准指标、大视觉语言模型评估和人工评测上显著超越先前最先进模型。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复偏好对齐研究多侧重于提出新方法，但缺乏对核心挑战（如奖励模型可靠性、偏差及奖励破解问题）的系统性分析与理解，本文旨在从第一性原理出发填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 采用直接偏好优化框架，利用多个公开奖励模型构造偏好训练数据，涵盖9种奖励模型、2个基准测试集以及两种架构和生成机制不同的基线修复模型，并通过奖励模型集成与校准集成方法来缓解偏差与奖励破解。
AI.result: 实验发现多数奖励模型可为偏好数据构建提供有效信号但部分不可靠；偏好数据在候选缩放和样本缩放下呈现一致趋势；奖励模型在亮度、构图和色彩方案上存在显著偏差易引发奖励破解；简单集成方法可缓解偏差并获得鲁棒性能；偏好对齐可迁移至物体移除任务；校准集成能进一步抑制奖励破解并提升鲁棒性；在不修改架构或引入额外数据的情况下，模型在标准指标、大视觉语言模型评估和人工评测上大幅超越先前最优模型。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了图像修复偏好对齐中奖励模型的固有偏差及其导致的奖励破解问题，证明了简单奖励模型集成方法的有效性，并指出偏好对齐可泛化至物体移除等下游任务，为未来偏好对齐研究提供了重要的经验性基准和实用指南。

title: CP-Agent: Context-Aware Multimodal Reasoning for Cellular Morphological Profiling under Chemical Perturbations
summary: Cell Painting combines multiplexed fluorescent staining, high-content imaging, and quantitative analysis to generate high-dimensional phenotypic readouts to support diverse downstream tasks such as mechanism-of-action (MoA) inference, toxicity prediction, and construction of drug-disease atlases. However, existing workflows are slow, costly and difficult to interpret. Approaches for drug screening modeling predominantly focus on molecular representation learning, while neglecting actual experimental context (e.g., cell line, dosing schedule, etc.), limiting generalization and MoA resolution. We introduce CP-Agent, an agentic multimodal large language model (MLLM) capable of generating mechanism-relevant, human-interpretable rationales for cell morphological changes under drug perturbations. At its core, CP-Agent leverages a context-aware alignment module, CP-CLIP, that jointly embeds high-content images and experimental metadata to enable robust treatment and MoA discrimination (achieving a maximum F1-score of 0.896). By integrating CP-CLIP outputs with agentic tool usage and reasoning, CP-Agent compiles rationales into a structured report to guide experimental design and hypothesis refinement. These capabilities highlight CP-Agent's potential to accelerate drug discovery by enabling more interpretable, scalable, and context-aware phenotypic screening -- streamlining iterative cycles of hypothesis generation in drug discovery.

AI.tldr: CP-Agent是一种基于多模态大语言模型的智能体框架，通过上下文感知对齐模块CP-CLIP联合编码高内涵图像与实验元数据，能够生成机制相关且人类可解释的细胞形态变化推理报告，在药物作用机制判别任务上达到最高0.896的F1分数，推动了可解释、可扩展的上下文感知表型筛选。
AI.motivation: 现有细胞绘画（Cell Painting）工作流速度慢、成本高且难以解释；当前的药物筛选建模方法主要聚焦于分子表示学习，忽略了细胞系、给药方案等关键实验上下文信息，导致泛化能力不足和作用机制（MoA）分辨率有限。
AI.method: CP-Agent提出了一个上下文感知对齐模块CP-CLIP，用于联合嵌入高内涵图像与实验元数据；在此基础上整合多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的智能体工具调用与推理能力，自动将推理结果编译为结构化报告以指导实验设计与假设优化。
AI.result: CP-Agent在药物处理与作用机制判别任务上实现了最高0.896的F1分数，验证了其强大的治疗区分与MoA识别能力，同时生成了机制相关且人类可理解的形态变化解释。
AI.conclusion: CP-Agent通过融合上下文感知的多模态对齐与智能体推理，显著提升了表型筛选的可解释性、可扩展性与上下文感知能力，有望加速药物发现中假设生成与验证的迭代循环。

title: PaddleOCR-VL-1.6: Expanding the Frontier of Document Parsing with Under-Optimized Region Refinement and Progressive Post-Training
summary: We introduce PaddleOCR-VL-1.6, an upgraded compact document parsing model built upon PaddleOCR-VL-1.5. Although PaddleOCR-VL-1.5 establishes a strong 0.9B baseline, its remaining errors concentrate in under-optimized regions where model behavior is unstable, data coverage is sparse, or supervision is unreliable. Rather than expanding the training corpus indiscriminately, PaddleOCR-VL-1.6 introduces a region-aware data optimization framework that identifies weak regions from the previous model, applies targeted enhancement to these regions, and improves the reliability of supervision signals. It further adopts a progressive post-training recipe based on curated data selection and reinforcement learning, pushing model performance to a higher level through staged optimization. PaddleOCR-VL-1.6 achieves a new state-of-the-art score of 96.33% on OmniDocBench v1.6, demonstrates strong competitiveness against top-tier VLMs, and provides a practical post-training recipe for the PaddleOCR-VL series.

AI.tldr: PaddleOCR-VL-1.6 提出区域感知数据优化框架与渐进式后训练策略，在不盲目扩充数据的前提下针对模型薄弱区域进行定向增强，在 OmniDocBench v1.6 上达到 96.33% 的新 SOTA，并为 PaddleOCR-VL 系列提供了实用的后训练方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管 PaddleOCR-VL-1.5 建立了强大的 0.9B 基线，但其剩余错误集中在行为不稳定、数据覆盖稀疏或监督信号不可靠的欠优化区域；直接盲目扩充训练语料并非高效方案，因此亟需一种能够精准识别并强化模型薄弱环节的数据优化方法。
AI.method: 提出区域感知数据优化框架，包含三个关键步骤：从先前模型中识别薄弱区域、对这些区域进行定向增强、并提升监督信号的可靠性；进一步采用基于精选数据选择和强化学习的渐进式后训练策略，通过分阶段优化推动模型性能提升。
AI.result: PaddleOCR-VL-1.6 在 OmniDocBench v1.6 上取得 96.33% 的新 SOTA 分数，并展现出与顶级 VLM 模型竞争的实力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了针对薄弱区域进行定向优化比盲目扩充数据更为有效，同时为 PaddleOCR-VL 系列提供了一套实用的后训练方案，展示了紧凑型文档解析模型通过精细化训练策略可以达到与大型模型相竞争的性能水平。

title: StepFinder: A Temporal Semantic Framework for Failure Attribution in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems exhibit remarkable collaborative capabilities in complex multi-step tasks. However, these systems are highly sensitive to single-step execution errors that can propagate through agent interactions and lead to cascading failures. To understand the causes of failure and improve system reliability, failure attribution has been introduced as a task that aims to automatically identify the root cause step responsible for a failure. Existing failure attribution methods mainly rely on LLMs to reason over original execution trajectories, which not only incur high inference costs and latency, but also suffer from interference caused by redundant and noisy execution logs, causing LLMs to struggle in accurately identifying the true root cause step. To address this, we propose StepFinder, a lightweight failure attribution framework. We use LLMs solely during the feature construction phase to encode execution logs into temporal semantic sequences. Subsequently, a parameter-efficient combination of temporal modeling and attention modules is applied to capture the sequential evolution and cross-step dependencies of the trajectories. Finally, the step-level error score is refined through multi-scale differences and position bias, enabling precise root cause identification. Experimental results on the Who&When benchmark demonstrate that StepFinder outperforms LLM-based methods in step-level failure attribution while achieving substantially higher inference efficiency, reducing inference time by 79% compared with the fastest LLM-based method, with no text generation overhead. Our code is available at https://github.com/taiyu-zhu/StepFinder.

AI.tldr: StepFinder是一种轻量级故障归因框架，通过将LLM仅用于执行日志的特征编码，并结合时序建模与注意力模块高效地捕捉跨步骤依赖，在Who&When基准上超越LLM基线方法，同时减少79%推理时间。
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统在复杂多步任务中对单步执行错误高度敏感，错误可能通过智能体间交互传播并导致级联失效。现有故障归因方法依赖LLM对原始执行轨迹进行推理，不仅推理成本和延迟高，而且冗余和嘈杂的执行日志干扰了LLM准确识别真正根因步骤的能力。
AI.method: StepFinder将LLM仅用于特征构建阶段，将执行日志编码为时序语义序列；随后采用参数高效的时序建模与注意力模块的组合，捕获轨迹的时序演化与跨步骤依赖关系；最后通过多尺度差异和位置偏置对步骤级错误分数进行精炼，实现精确的根因步骤识别。
AI.result: 在Who&When基准上，StepFinder在步骤级故障归因上优于基于LLM的方法，同时实现了显著更高的推理效率：相较于最快的LLM方法，推理时间减少79%，且无文本生成开销。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，分离特征构建与推理过程、采用轻量级参数高效模型替代LLM全程推理，能够在保持甚至提升故障归因准确性的同时大幅降低计算开销，为多智能体系统的可靠性分析提供了高效可行的新范式。

title: P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO: Grounding Hallucination in Perceptual Processing via Calibration Direct Preference Optimization
summary: Hallucination has recently garnered significant research attention in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aims to learn directly from the corrected preferences provided by humans, thereby addressing the hallucination issue. Despite its success, this paradigm has yet to specifically target the perceptual bottleneck in attended regions or address insufficient Visual Robustness against image degradation. Furthermore, existing preference pairs are often vision-agnostic and their inherently off-policy nature limits their effectiveness in guiding model learning. To address these challenges, we propose Perceptual Processing Direct Preference Optimization (P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO), a novel training paradigm in which the model generates and learns from its own preference pairs, thereby directly addressing the identified visual bottlenecks while inherently avoiding the issues of vision-agnostic and off-policy data. It introduces: (1) an on-policy preference pairs construction method targeting Focus-and-Enhance perception and Visual Robustness, and (2) a well-designed Calibration Loss to precisely align visual signals with the causal generation of text. Experimental results demonstrate that with a comparable amount of training data and cost, P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO outperforms strong baselines that rely on costly human feedback on benchmarks. Furthermore, evaluations on Attention Region Fidelity (ARF) and image degradation scenarios validate the effectiveness of P\textsuperscript{2}-DPO in addressing perceptual bottleneck in attended regions and improving Visual Robustness against degraded inputs.

AI.tldr: 提出P²-DPO，一种让模型基于自身生成偏好对进行学习的训练范式，直接针对LVLM中的感知瓶颈和视觉鲁棒性不足问题，通过对策略偏好对构建和校准损失设计，在较低成本下显著优于依赖昂贵人类反馈的强基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有DPO方法未能针对LVLM中注意力区域的感知瓶颈和图像退化下的视觉鲁棒性不足问题进行优化；同时，现有偏好对常忽视视觉信号且具有离策略性质，限制了模型学习效果。
AI.method: 提出P²-DPO训练范式，核心包括：(1) 面向Focus-and-Enhance感知和视觉鲁棒性的对策略偏好对构建方法，让模型生成并学习自身偏好数据；(2) 校准损失函数，用于精确对齐视觉信号与文本的因果生成过程，避免视觉无关和离策略数据问题。
AI.result: 在相近训练数据量和成本下，P²-DPO在多个基准上超越依赖昂贵人类反馈的强基线；在注意力区域保真度和图像退化场景评估中，验证了其有效改善感知瓶颈和提升视觉鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: P²-DPO通过自生成对策略偏好对和视觉-文本校准损失，有效解决了LVLM中的感知瓶颈与视觉鲁棒性问题，为无需人类偏好反馈的视觉语言模型优化提供了可行方向。

title: SAGE: A Quantitative Evaluation of Socialized Evolution in Agent Ecosystems
summary: Self-improving language agents are typically evaluated in isolation: an agent attempts a task, receives feedback, and iteratively refines its own behavior. Yet agents increasingly operate alongside peers whose strategies and outcomes are publicly visible. This raises an under-studied question: when does shared experience produce improvements that self-improvement alone cannot achieve? We introduce SAGE (Social Agent Group Evolution),an evaluation framework that compares two compute-matched conditions: SocialEvo, where agents from five distinct model families co-evolve with access to all peers' histories; and SelfEvo, where each agent receives the same number of task attempts but sees only its own past, which is conventional in self-improving agent studies. We instantiate SAGE in three arenas: open-ended ML research, long-horizon economic planning, and strategic multiplayer play, evaluated across multiple evolutionary rounds. We find that group history is not a universal amplifier: the strongest agent does not exceed its self-evolution ceiling. However, agents that plateau under self-improvement can achieve significant breakthroughs when peer experience is available. In competitive settings, counterfactual controls reveal that agents improve generally rather than developing opponent-specific strategies. Across different forms of shared history, filtered peer traces and reflective summaries often outperform raw logs, indicating that social gains depend on abstraction rather than exposure volume. These findings reveal that peer-history gains are agent-specific, arena-dependent, and contingent on the capacity to abstract transferable knowledge from public traces.

AI.tldr: SAGE框架通过对比SocialEvo（群体演化）与SelfEvo（自我演化）两种计算对等条件，系统研究了共享经验对语言智能体进化的影响，发现群体历史并非普遍放大器，但能使陷入平台期的智能体实现突破性提升，且社会性收益取决于从公共轨迹中抽象可迁移知识的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自改进语言智能体研究通常在孤立环境中评估个体性能，忽视了智能体日益在同伴策略和结果公开可见的环境中运作的现实，因此存在一个尚未深入研究的问题：共享经验何时能产生自我改进无法单独实现的提升。
AI.method: 提出了SAGE（Social Agent Group Evolution）评估框架，比较两种计算对等条件：SocialEvo让来自五个不同模型家族的智能体共同进化并访问所有同伴的历史轨迹；SelfEvo让每个智能体获得相同次数的任务尝试但只能看到自己的历史。在开放式ML研究、长周期经济规划和策略性多人游戏三个场景中跨多轮进化进行评估。
AI.result: 群体历史并非通用放大器，最强智能体不会超越其自我进化上限；但陷入平台期的智能体在获得同伴经验后可实现显著突破。在竞争环境中，反事实对照显示智能体进行的是通用改进而非发展对手特定策略。不同形式的共享历史中，经过过滤的同伴轨迹和反思摘要通常优于原始日志，表明社会性收益依赖于抽象能力而非暴露数量。
AI.conclusion: 同伴历史带来的收益具有智能体特异性、场景依赖性，并取决于从公共轨迹中抽象可迁移知识的能力，揭示了社会性学习在智能体进化中的关键条件与边界。

title: Enginuity: A Dataset and Benchmark for Vision-Language Understanding of Engineering Diagrams
summary: Engineering diagrams pose a distinct challenge for vision-language models: unlike natural images or general documents, they encode information through dense spatial layouts, domain-specific symbols, and cross-references between visual callouts and structured parts tables. Despite their centrality to service, repair, and design workflows, there is no public benchmark for measuring VLM capabilities in this domain; existing datasets primarily focus on flowcharts, scientific figures, or business documents. To address this gap, we introduce Enginuity, the first open dataset and benchmark for evaluating VLMs on complex engineering diagrams. We define two tasks over a corpus of U.S. military service and repair manuals: structured parts-table extraction (Task 1) and free-form visual diagram question answering (VQA)(Task 2) for benchmarking. We evaluate four frontier VLMs (GPT-5.2 Chat, Claude Opus 4.7, Gemma 4, Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct) under zero-shot and chain-of-thought prompting. On Task 1, models reach Recall@all of 0.61-0.87 but Token F1pen of only 0.03-0.18, exposing a systematic gap between part identification and description fidelity. Task 2 reveals a consistent factual-reasoning gap across all models. A supporting analysis shows that token-overlap metrics under-report model capability on technical descriptions by 2-6x relative to semantic similarity, motivating LLM-as-judge calibration for domain-specific evaluation. We release the dataset, annotations, evaluation harness, and per-sample model outputs to support a reproducible study of VLM capability on engineering content.

AI.tldr: Enginuity是首个面向复杂工程图纸的开放基准数据集，包含结构化零件表提取和自由形式视觉问答两个任务。评测四款前沿VLM发现，模型在零件识别上尚可（Recall@all 0.61-0.87），但描述准确度极低（Token F1pen 0.03-0.18），且存在系统性的事实推理缺陷。
AI.motivation: 工程图纸通过密集空间布局、领域特定符号以及视觉标注与结构化零件表之间的交叉引用编码信息，但现有的VLM数据集主要聚焦于流程图、科学图表或商业文档，缺乏针对复杂工程图纸的公开评测基准来衡量VLM在此领域的能力。
AI.method: 基于美军维修手册语料构建了Enginuity数据集，定义了两个评测任务：结构化零件表提取（Task 1）和自由形式视觉问答（Task 2）。评估了GPT-5.2 Chat、Claude Opus 4.7、Gemma 4和Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct四款前沿VLM，采用零样本和链式思维两种提示策略，并使用Token F1pen、Recall@all及语义相似度等多种指标进行评测。
AI.result: Task 1中模型Recall@all达到0.61-0.87，但Token F1pen仅为0.03-0.18，表明零件识别与描述准确性之间存在系统性差距。Task 2揭示所有模型均存在一致的事实推理缺陷。此外，标记重叠指标相比语义相似度低估了技术描述能力2-6倍，表明领域特定评测需要LLM-as-judge校准。
AI.conclusion: 现有VLM在工程图纸理解上存在显著的零件描述准确性和事实推理能力缺陷；传统token-overlap指标严重低估模型在技术描述上的表现，需引入语义相似度和LLM-as-judge等校准方法；Enginuity数据集和评测框架为领域内可复现研究提供了基础。

title: Diagnosing Knowledge Gaps in LLM Tool Use: An Agentic Benchmark for Novel API Acquisition
summary: Large language models for code generation often need to use APIs that are absent from their pretraining data. This requires more than recalling a function name: models must coordinate signatures, module paths, input-output contracts, semantics, and executable usage patterns. Existing novel-API benchmarks are typically static, rely on coarse pass/fail metrics, or use synthetic APIs that may not reflect real library evolution. We introduce NovelAPIBench, a fully automated dynamic benchmark that, for any base model and target library, discovers novel APIs, extracts decomposed knowledge bundles, generates executable coding tasks, and assigns failed samples to six diagnostic categories. Across about 1.9K tasks, four base models, and five domains, we compare knowledge injected through retrieval with knowledge internalized through parametric adaptation. We find that knowledge components are not interchangeable: usage examples are the strongest standalone signal, while the best two-component setting pairs signatures with either mechanisms or examples depending on the domain and backbone. Adding more context, especially source code, can hurt by increasing import-path errors. Parametric adaptation also does not replace retrieval once external knowledge is removed; rather, fine-tuning mainly teaches models how to use provided bundles, and this ability transfers to held-out libraries. These results suggest that retrieval and tuning play complementary roles: retrieval supplies volatile API content, while tuning improves procedural integration.

AI.tldr: NovelAPIBench是一个全自动动态基准，用于评估代码生成模型在未见API上的表现；实验发现知识组件不可互换，检索与参数调优作用互补：检索提供易变的API内容，调优提升程序性整合能力。
AI.motivation: 现有面向未见API的代码生成基准存在静态化、依赖粗粒度通过/失败指标、或使用不反映真实库演变的合成API等局限，缺乏对API知识解耦和细粒度错误诊断的系统研究。
AI.method: 提出NovelAPIBench框架，对任意基础模型和目标库自动完成发现新API、提取解耦知识束（如签名、模块路径、输入输出契约、语义、使用模式）、生成可执行编程任务，并将失败样本归入六种诊断类别；在约1.9K任务、四个基础模型、五个领域上比较了通过检索注入知识与通过参数适应内化知识的效果。
AI.result: 使用示例是最强的单一知识信号；最佳的双组件组合根据领域和骨干网络不同，将签名与机制或示例配对；增加上下文（尤其是源码）可能因导入路径错误增加而损害性能；参数适应无法替代检索，微调主要教会模型如何使用提供的知识束，且此能力可迁移至未见库。
AI.conclusion: 检索和微调在代码生成中扮演互补角色：检索负责提供易变的API内容，微调负责提升程序性整合能力；知识组件不可互换，需根据领域和模型选择合适组合。

title: IDO: Incongruity-aware Distribution Optimization for Multimodal Fake News Detection
summary: Multimodal fake news detection aims to identify the authenticity of news. Existing multimodal fake news detection methods mainly focus on cross-modal consistency, but often fail to explicitly model the semantic incongruity that characterizes deceptive multimodal content. However, misinformation often contains semantic information incongruity with the facts. To address these challenges, we propose Incongruity-aware Distribution Optimization (IDO) to improve the performance of fake news detection from the perspectives of factual incongruity and modality incongruity. For factual incongruity, we introduce a channel-wise reweighting strategy to obtain semantically discriminative embeddings and utilize gaussian distribution to model the uncertain correlation caused by factual incongruity. For modality incongruity, we utilize incongruity contrastive learning to learn cross-modal semantic information. Experiments demonstrate that IDO achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出语义不一致感知分布优化（IDO）框架，从事实不一致性和模态不一致性两个角度显式建模多模态虚假新闻中的语义矛盾，并利用通道重加权、高斯分布建模和对比学习等技术，在虚假新闻检测任务上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态虚假新闻检测方法主要关注跨模态一致性，但未能显式建模虚假多模态内容中普遍存在的语义不一致性，即信息与事实之间存在语义矛盾，这一关键问题尚未得到有效解决。
AI.method: 提出不一致感知分布优化（IDO）框架，包含两个方面：对事实不一致性，引入通道级重加权策略获取语义判别性嵌入，并利用高斯分布建模由事实不一致导致的不确定相关性；对模态不一致性，采用不一致对比学习来学习跨模态语义信息。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的IDO方法在多个基准数据集上取得了最先进的性能，验证了其在多模态虚假新闻检测任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了虚假新闻检测中显式建模语义不一致性的重要性，提出的IDO框架从事实和模态两个维度有效提升了检测性能，为多模态虚假新闻检测提供了新的研究思路和实用方法。

title: EvoDrive: Pareto Evolution for Safety-Critical Autonomous Driving via Self-Improving LLM Agents
summary: Generating safety-critical scenarios is essential for validating and improving autonomous driving systems, yet it inherently requires maximizing adversariality to expose failures while preserving realism. Existing methods usually manage this trade-off with handcrafted heuristics, confining generation to known priors and overlooking underexplored patterns. While recent open-ended agentic evolution can push this limit, unconstrained general agents lack strict simulator grounding and tend to collapse the multi-objective tension into single-scalar maximization. Here we present EvoDrive, the first automated, LLM-based agentic evolution framework for multi-objective scenario generation. EvoDrive employs a simulator-grounded actor-critic architecture where a memory-driven actor iteratively proposes improvements to the generators and critics filter out implausible candidates, and a self-evolving world evaluator routes promising proposals to optimize simulation budgets. EvoDrive further maintains a Pareto archive of evaluated candidates to preserve diverse attack-realism trade-offs and guide future evolution via simulation feedback. Benchmark results on MetaDrive and CARLA show that EvoDrive not only significantly expands the Pareto frontier across various generators, but also produces valuable scenarios for policy training.

AI.tldr: EvoDrive is首个基于LLM的智能体进化框架，用于自动驾驶的多目标安全关键场景生成；它采用模拟器固化的演员-评论家架构与Pareto存档机制，在MetaDrive和CARLA上显著扩展了Pareto前沿并生成对策略训练有价值的场景。
AI.motivation: 现有安全关键场景生成方法依赖手工启发式规则来平衡对抗性与真实性，限制了生成空间并忽略了未探索的模式；而开放式的智能体进化虽能突破此限制，但缺乏严格的模拟器约束，容易将多目标优化退化为单一标量最大化问题。
AI.method: EvoDrive提出了一种模拟器固化的演员-评论家架构：记忆驱动的演员迭代地向生成器提出改进建议，评论家过滤不可行的候选方案，自进化世界评估器对有价值的提案进行路由以优化仿真预算；同时维护一个Pareto存档来保存已评估候选方案的攻击-真实性权衡，并通过仿真反馈引导后续进化。
AI.result: 在MetaDrive和CARLA上的基准测试结果表明，EvoDrive不仅在各种生成器上显著扩展了Pareto前沿，还生成了对策略训练有价值的场景。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将LLM驱动的智能体进化与模拟器固化及多目标优化相结合，能够有效突破传统启发式方法的局限，生成更具多样性和价值的对抗场景，为自动驾驶系统的安全验证提供了新的自动化范式。

title: Characterizing Detectability in 3DGS Poisoning: A Stage-wise Benchmark
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has rapidly emerged as a leading representation for real-time novel view synthesis, but recent work shows it is vulnerable to diverse poisoning attacks, including illusory object injection, computation cost amplification, and post hoc model watermarking. Despite this expanding threat surface, existing studies focus mainly on attack success, while defense and detection remain underexplored. From a detection perspective, a key challenge and opportunity arise from the multi-stage nature of the 3DGS reconstruction pipeline, which produces heterogeneous intermediate representations. Forensic signals for detecting poisoning are inherently stage dependent: an attack introduced at one stage may produce signals that emerge only at later stages. This motivates a stage-wise view of detectability that goes beyond single-stage evaluation. We introduce Poison-3DGS, a benchmark for stage-wise characterization of poisoning detection in 3DGS. It exposes stage-specific artifacts, including multi-view images, geometry, training dynamics, and Gaussian parameters, across a diverse set of scenes and attacks. Using it, we conduct a systematic study of detectability across pipeline stages. Our analysis reveals several insights. First, detectability varies significantly across stages, and no single stage consistently dominates across attack types. Second, different attacks exhibit distinct stage-specific forensic signals, so detection effectiveness depends critically on where signals are observed. Third, later-stage signals such as training dynamics and Gaussian parameter statistics provide strong cues not observable at earlier stages. Overall, our work provides a principled benchmark and the first systematic characterization of stage-dependent detectability in 3DGS, offering a foundation for future research on robust and reliable 3DGS systems.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了 Poison-3DGS 基准，系统研究了 3D 高斯泼溅（3DGS）重建管线中不同阶段的投毒检测能力，揭示了检测效果高度依赖于攻击类型与观测阶段，且后期信号（训练动态、高斯参数）提供了早期阶段无法获取的强检测线索。
AI.motivation: 尽管 3D 高斯泼溅（3DGS）在实时新视角合成中表现优异，但已有研究表明其对多种投毒攻击（如虚假物体注入、计算开销放大、事后水印）高度脆弱，然而现有研究主要聚焦攻击本身，防御与检测方法严重不足。尤其缺乏从检测角度系统理解投毒信号在 3DGS 多阶段重建管线中如何分布与演变的工作。
AI.method: 提出了 Poison-3DGS 基准，用于对 3DGS 投毒检测进行分阶段表征。该基准将 3DGS 管线拆解为多个阶段（多视角图像、几何、训练动态、高斯参数），并在多种场景与攻击类型下暴露各阶段特有的伪影信号，据此开展跨阶段的系统性可检测性分析。
AI.result: 实验发现：（1）不同攻击类型在不同阶段的可检测性差异显著，没有任何单一阶段对所有攻击均占优；（2）不同攻击在特定阶段产生独特的取证信号，检测效果高度依赖于信号观察的阶段；（3）后期信号（如训练动态与高斯参数统计）提供了早期阶段无法观测到的强检测线索。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次系统刻画了 3DGS 投毒检测的阶段依赖性，为后续构建鲁棒且可靠的 3DGS 系统提供了原则性基准与重要基础性见解。

title: EvoMemNav: Efficient Self-Evolving Fine-Grained Memory for Zero-Shot Embodied Navigation
summary: Building memory is essential for long-horizon planning in zero-shot embodied navigation. Detector-centric scene graphs often compress observations into sparse nodes, discarding fine-grained visual evidence and accumulating noise, while 3D reconstruction-based methods remain computationally prohibitive. We present EvoMemNav, an efficient, self-evolving, fine-grained memory framework for zero-shot embodied navigation. EvoMemNav constructs a Visual-Semantic Memory Graph (VSMGraph) that keeps raw views as first-class memory and organizes them with lightweight semantic cues and topological relations into a room-view-object hierarchy, preserving fine-grained details for disambiguation and Stop verification. To scale to growing memory, we introduce a budgeted coarse-to-fine policy: a coarse stage compresses the search space into promising regions, and a fine stage invokes a VLM only for targeted verification and decision. Beyond static memories, EvoMemNav performs reflection-driven write-back after each subtask, updating graph-attached priors that encode accumulated environmental knowledge to refine future decisions without retraining. Experiments on GOAT-Bench and HM3D across object, text-description, and image-goal modalities show consistent gains in SR/SPL, with better multi-instance disambiguation, fewer premature stops, and stronger zero-shot generalization.

AI.tldr: EvoMemNav提出了一种高效、自演化的细粒度记忆框架EvoMemNav用于零样本具身导航，通过视觉语义记忆图（VSMGraph）保留原始视图作为一等记忆，并结合预算化的粗到细策略与反射驱动回写机制，在GOAT-Bench和HM3D数据集上显著提升了SR/SPL指标，实现了更强的多实例区分和零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本具身导航的记忆构建方法存在两大局限：基于检测器的场景图将观测压缩为稀疏节点，丢弃了细粒度视觉证据并累积噪声；而基于3D重建的方法计算成本过高，难以实用。因此，研究旨在构建一种既能保留细粒度视觉信息又能高效扩展的自演化记忆框架。
AI.method: EvoMemNav构建了视觉语义记忆图（VSMGraph），将原始视图作为一等记忆保留，并利用轻量级语义线索和拓扑关系组织为房间-视图-对象层次结构。框架采用预算化的粗到细策略：粗阶段将搜索空间压缩至有希望的区域，细阶段仅在需要时调用VLM进行验证和决策。此外，EvoMemNav在每个子任务后执行反射驱动的回写操作，更新图附着的先验知识以编码累积环境信息，无需重训练即可优化后续决策。
AI.result: 在GOAT-Bench和HM3D数据集上，针对物体、文本描述和图像目标三种模态的实验表明，EvoMemNav在成功率（SR）和SPL指标上持续取得改进，实现了更好的多实例区分能力，减少了过早停止现象，并展现出更强的零样本泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: EvoMemNav通过保留原始视图的细粒度记忆和反射驱动的自演化机制，有效解决了传统方法中视觉信息损失和计算开销大的问题，为零样本长视距导航提供了一种高效可扩展的解决方案，其层次化记忆与预算化推理策略对未来具身智能体的记忆设计具有重要启示。

title: Enhancing Operational Safety via Agentic Dialogue Hazard Identification Analysis
summary: Operational safety in high-stakes domains such as industrial process control, autonomous, and safety-critical systems, demand reliable hazard identification. While large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in automating safety analysis tasks, single-turn, monolithic inference is brittle: it lacks the self-correction, deliberation, and contextual refinement that safety engineers apply iteratively. In this paper, we introduce HAZDIAL, a framework that investigates whether structured agentic dialogue-multi-agent, multi-turn interactions improves the quality of NLP- based hazard identification over single-pass baselines. We systematically compare two dialogue modalities: adversarial debate and constructive discussion, and propose an algorithm-based agentic interaction optimization. We evaluate all configurations against a curated golden dataset using standard classification metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1) and novel dialogue metrics. This work advances the intersection of dialogue systems, multi-agent reasoning, and AI safety, providing an empirical evidence for dialogue-driven hazard analysis.

AI.tldr: HAZDIAL是一个多智能体对话框架，通过结构化智能体对话（对抗性辩论与建设性讨论）提升NLP危险识别质量，实验表明相比单轮基线，该方法在分类指标和对话指标上均有改善。
AI.motivation: 高风险领域（如工业过程控制、自主系统、安全关键系统）中的操作安全性要求可靠的危险识别，而大规模语言模型（LLM）在自动化安全分析任务中虽展现出潜力，但其单轮、整体式推理缺乏安全工程师所采用的迭代式自我修正、深思熟虑和上下文细化能力，存在推理脆弱性问题。
AI.method: 提出HAZDIAL框架，引入结构化智能体对话（多智能体、多轮交互）进行危险识别，系统比较两种对话模式——对抗性辩论（adversarial debate）与建设性讨论（constructive discussion），并提出了基于算法的智能体交互优化方法。
AI.result: 在精心整理的金标准数据集上，对所有配置使用标准分类指标（准确率、精确率、召回率、F1值）以及新颖的对话指标进行系统评估，验证了多智能体对话驱动方法相比单轮基线的整体优势。
AI.conclusion: 该研究推进了对话系统、多智能体推理与AI安全领域的交叉研究，为对话驱动的危险分析方法提供了实证依据，表明结构化多轮智能体交互能够有效提升危险识别的质量与可靠性。

title: When Attention Collapses: Stage-Aware Visual Token Pruning from Structure to Semantics
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities but suffer from significant computational overhead during inference. While visual token pruning offers a promising solution, existing methods predominantly rely on initial attention scores. This single-metric paradigm presents a critical flaw: high attention scores inherently collapse onto semantically similar regions, thereby severely reducing feature diversity and discarding vital contextual details. To address this, we introduce Structure-to-Semantics (STS), a novel two-stage visual token pruning framework that explicitly decouples the pruning process. The first stage employs a repulsion-based sampling mechanism to maximize spatial and structural diversity. The second stage leverages instruction-aware cross-attention to precisely filter out prompt-irrelevant tokens. This two-stage synergy constitutes the core of STS, first ensuring geometric coverage and then refining the retained tokens according to semantic relevance. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that STS mitigates the redundancy caused by attention-based selection, improving both structural diversity and fine-grained task alignment of the preserved visual tokens.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STS框架，通过解耦视觉Token剪枝为结构采样与语义筛选两阶段，解决了现有基于注意力分数的单指标剪枝方法导致特征多样性丢失和上下文细节缺失的问题，在提升结构多样性的同时实现了细粒度任务对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型推理开销大，视觉Token剪枝虽可缓解但主流方法仅依赖初始注意力分数进行单指标筛选，导致高分Token集中在语义相似区域，严重降低特征多样性并丢失关键的上下文细节。
AI.method: 提出两阶段视觉Token剪枝框架STS：第一阶段采用基于排斥力的采样机制最大化空间和结构多样性，第二阶段利用指令感知的交叉注意力精确过滤与提示无关的Token，两阶段协同实现几何覆盖与语义相关性筛选的显式解耦。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，STS有效缓解了注意力分数选择带来的冗余问题，在提升保留视觉Token的结构多样性的同时改善了细粒度任务对齐性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示并解决了单指标注意力分数剪枝的固有缺陷，证明将剪枝过程解耦为结构多样性和语义相关性两个独立阶段是一种更优的策略，为VLM高效推理提供了新的技术路径。

title: Calibrating Urban Traffic Simulation from Sparse Road Observations via Genetic Optimization
summary: Urban traffic simulation is a critical tool for infrastructure planning, including the placement of electric vehicle charging stations. However, realistic traffic simulation across many cities is hindered by two fundamental data limitations: detailed real-world traffic measurements are available for only a small fraction of road segments in most cities, and employment distribution data critical for modeling commuter traffic is rarely available at the resolution needed for simulation. This paper presents a genetic algorithm-based framework that directly addresses both limitations, calibrating urban traffic simulations from sparse road observations without requiring detailed job location data. Using the SUMO traffic simulation platform for Greensboro, North Carolina, our approach optimizes job distributions and gate-traffic parameters to align simulated traffic with a small sample of roads with known traffic-flow rates. We demonstrate that this approach produces simulated traffic that correlates well with real-world measurements, generalizes to road segments withheld from training, and produces job distributions that show promising qualitative agreement with census employment data despite never directly training on that employment data. This work demonstrates that realistic urban traffic simulation can be achieved from minimal real-world observations, offering a scalable and data-light approach to simulation calibration that reduces the barrier to deploying traffic models across diverse cities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于遗传算法的框架，仅利用稀疏道路观测数据和无需详细就业分布信息即可校准城市交通仿真，在SUMO平台上对北卡罗来纳州格林斯博罗市进行实验，证明该方法能产生与真实测量数据高度相关的交通流模拟，并推广至未参与训练的 withheld 路段。
AI.motivation: 城市交通仿真在基础设施规划中至关重要，但多城市间的真实交通仿真面临两个根本性数据限制：大多数城市仅有少数路段的详细实测交通数据，以及建模通勤交通所需的高分辨率就业分布数据几乎不可得。现有方法因数据需求过高而难以规模化部署。
AI.method: 本文提出一个基于遗传算法的框架，通过优化就业分布和门控交通参数，使基于SUMO平台的城市交通仿真与少量已知交通流率的道路观测数据对齐。该方法直接应对数据稀疏和就业分布缺失两大限制，无需依赖详尽的就业位置数据。
AI.result: 在格林斯博罗市的实验中，该框架生成的仿真交通与真实测量数据相关性良好，能泛化至未参与训练的道路段，并且其生成的就业分布在从未直接使用就业数据进行训练的情况下，仍与人口普查就业数据呈现有前景的定性一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，仅需极少的真实观测数据即可实现真实感的城市交通仿真，提供了一种可扩展且数据轻量的仿真校准方法，显著降低了在不同城市间部署交通模型的门槛。

title: SkelHCC: A Hyperbolic CLIP-Driven Cache Adaptation Framework for Skeleton-based One-Shot Action Recognition
summary: Skeleton-based action recognition aims to understand human behaviors from body joint sequences and is especially challenging in the one-shot setting, where only a single labeled exemplar is available for each novel action. A key challenge is learning representations that capture the hierarchical and compositional structure of human motion while aligning effectively with high-level action semantics under extreme data scarcity. Existing approaches, largely based on Euclidean embeddings and low-level motion cues, struggle to model the tree-like organization of skeleton data, limiting cross-modal alignment and generalization to unseen action categories. We propose SkelHCC, a unified skeleton hyperbolic CLIP-driven cache adaptation framework for one-shot skeleton-based action recognition. SkelHCC introduces an Explicitly Hierarchical Hyperbolic CLIP (EH-HCLIP) module that embeds skeleton sequences and action language into a shared hyperbolic space. By leveraging the negative curvature and exponential volume growth of hyperbolic geometry, EH-HCLIP naturally encodes the joint-part-body hierarchy of human anatomy and yields structurally consistent cross-modal representations. To support efficient one-shot adaptation, SkelHCC further integrates a training-free LLM-guided Multi-granularity Voting Cache (LMV-Cache) for context-aware inference. Experiments on NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and PKU-MMD demonstrate that SkelHCC consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: SkelHCC提出了一种基于双曲几何的CLIP驱动缓存自适应框架，通过显式层次化双曲CLIP模块和免训练的LLM引导多粒度投票缓存，在单样本骨架动作识别任务中显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 单样本骨架动作识别面临数据极度稀缺的挑战，现有方法依赖欧几里得嵌入和低层运动线索，难以建模骨架数据的树状层次结构（关节-部位-身体），导致跨模态对齐能力弱且对未见动作类别的泛化性能不足。
AI.method: SkelHCC框架包含两个核心模块：一是显式层次化双曲CLIP模块（EH-HCLIP），利用双曲几何的负曲率和指数级体积增长特性，将骨架序列和动作语言共同嵌入共享的双曲空间，天然编码人体解剖学中的关节-部位-身体层次结构，生成结构一致的跨模态表示；二是免训练的LLM引导多粒度投票缓存（LMV-Cache），用于上下文感知推理，实现高效的one-shot自适应。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120和PKU-MMD三个基准数据集上的实验表明，SkelHCC在所有评估指标上一致性地优于现有的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作验证了双曲几何在建模骨架层次结构上的有效性，证明了将双曲空间嵌入与CLIP跨模态对齐及缓存自适应机制相结合的思路，为数据稀缺场景下的人体动作理解提供了新的技术路径。

title: EvoDS: Self-Evolving Autonomous Data Science Agent with Skill Learning and Context Management
summary: Recent progress in Large Language Model (LLM) agents has enabled promising advances in automated data science. However, existing approaches remain fundamentally limited by their static action sets and lack of principled long-horizon context management, hindering their ability to accumulate reusable experience across tasks and operate reliably in multi-stage, iterative data science pipelines. To address these challenges, we introduce EvoDS, a self-evolving autonomous data science agent that learns to expand its skills and adaptively managing long-term context through agentic reinforcement learning. Specifically, EvoDS introduces two key strategies: (1) Autonomous Skill Acquisition (ASA) mechanism, which enables agents to synthesize, validate, and reuse executable skills; and (2) Adaptive Context Compression (ACC) strategy, which treats context management as a learned control problem rather than passive truncation. These strategies are orchestrated within a two-stage multi-agent training scheme, enabling EvoDS to autonomously improve over time. Theoretically, we prove that EvoDS's hierarchical design reduces tool-selection error, and its optimization objective aligns with an information bottleneck principle, ensuring efficient context use. Empirically, EvoDS outperforms state-of-the-art open-source data science agents by an average of 28.9% across four diverse benchmarks while eliminating out-of-token failures. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/usail-hkust/EvoDS.

AI.tldr: EvoDS 提出一种基于智能体强化学习的自演化数据科学智能体，通过自主技能获取与自适应上下文压缩两大策略，显著提升多阶段迭代数据科学管线的性能，平均超越已有最优开源方法 28.9%。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型智能体在自动化数据科学任务中仍受限于静态动作集和缺乏原则性的长程上下文管理机制，导致难以跨任务积累可复用的经验，也无法在需要多阶段迭代的数据科学管线上可靠运行。
AI.method: EvoDS 引入两大核心策略：自主技能获取（ASA）机制使智能体能够合成、验证并复用可执行技能；自适应上下文压缩（ACC）策略将上下文管理建模为可学习的控制问题而非被动截断。这两套策略通过两阶段多智能体训练方案进行编排，使 EvoDS 能够自主进化并随时间持续改进。
AI.result: 在四个多样的基准测试上，EvoDS 平均优于现有的最先进开源数据科学智能体 28.9%，同时完全消除了令牌超限导致的失败（out-of-token failures）。理论上证明了其层次化设计可降低工具选择误差，且优化目标符合信息瓶颈原则，确保了上下文使用的高效性。
AI.conclusion: EvoDS 将智能体的经验积累与上下文管理统一到强化学习框架下，为构建可自主进化的数据科学智能体提供了可行的理论依据与实现路径，未来可进一步推广至更广泛的复杂多步推理任务。

title: TurtleAI: Benchmarking Multimodal Models for Visual Programming in Turtle Graphics
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have been explored for visual programming, where they generate code to solve visual tasks. However, most prior work focuses on visual programming for productivity; it remains unclear how well current VLMs perform on education-oriented visual programming and what factors limit their performance. To bridge this gap, we introduce TurtleAI, a benchmark containing 823 tasks curated based on real-world visual programming tasks in the Turtle Graphics domain. Solving these tasks requires models to perceive geometric patterns, reason about spatial relationships, and synthesize Python code that faithfully reproduces geometric patterns. We evaluate 20+ VLMs, including GPT-5, GPT-4o, and Qwen2-VL-72B, and find that they struggle significantly, with most achieving success rates below 30%. To address these limitations, we propose a data generation technique that requires only a small set of seed samples. Fine-tuning Qwen2-VL-72B on the resulting synthetic data yields an improvement of about 20% on real-world tasks. Our failure analysis reveals that GPT-4o struggles with spatial reasoning and precise visual replication, whereas fine-tuning primarily improves the alignment between visual reasoning and code implementation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TurtleAI基准测试，包含823个基于Turtle Graphics的教育型视觉编程任务，发现当前VLMs在此任务上成功率普遍低于30%，并通过小样本种子数据合成微调Qwen2-VL-72B提升约20%性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉编程研究主要聚焦于生产力场景，而面向教育场景的视觉编程（如Turtle Graphics）中VLMs的表现尚未被系统评估，其性能限制因素也不明确。
AI.method: 构建TurtleAI基准（823个基于真实世界Turtle Graphics视觉编程任务）；评估20余种VLMs（含GPT-5、GPT-4o、Qwen2-VL-72B等）；提出基于少量种子样本的合成数据生成技术，微调Qwen2-VL-72B。
AI.result: 多数VLMs在TurtleAI上成功率低于30%；微调Qwen2-VL-72B在真实任务上提升约20%；失败分析显示GPT-4o在空间推理和精确视觉复现上存在困难，而微调主要改善了视觉推理与代码实现之间的对齐。
AI.conclusion: 教育型视觉编程对当前VLMs仍是重大挑战，瓶颈在于空间推理和视觉-代码对齐；小样本合成数据微调可显著提升性能，为未来改进提供了方向。

title: Imaginative Perception Tokens Enhance Spatial Reasoning in Multimodal Language Models
summary:
Vision language models (VLMs) excel at many tasks but still struggle with spatial reasoning when critical information is not directly observable. Many such problems require imaginative perception: inferring what would be seen from an unseen viewpoint, tracing paths through occluded spaces, or integrating partial observations into a coherent spatial representation. We introduce Imaginative Perception Tokens (IPT), intermediate perceptual representations that externalize what a VLM would perceive under alternative spatial configurations while remaining consistent with the observed input.
  To study this capability, we formulate three tasks, Perspective Taking (PET), Path Tracing (PT), and Multiview Counting (MVC), and construct datasets of approximately 20K examples with ground truth imaginations, answers, and evaluation benchmarks. Using the unified VLM BAGEL as the backbone, IPT supervision consistently improves spatial reasoning and often outperforms textual chain of thought training, even without generating images at inference time. On MVC, IPT improves accuracy by 3.4% and achieves competitive performance with strong closed-source models on PT. We further find that combining IPT and label-only supervision yields additional gains, whereas textual chain of thought can substantially degrade performance, suggesting a modality mismatch when spatial computation is forced through language. Overall, IPT provides a principled supervision signal for reasoning about unobserved spatial structure, improving generalization while producing interpretable intermediate representations.

AI.tldr: 提出想象感知令牌（IPT）作为中间感知表征，通过在视觉语言模型中外部化替代空间配置下的感知信息，显著提升空间推理能力，在视角推理、路径追踪和多视角计数三项任务上优于文本思维链训练，且无需推理时生成图像。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在处理关键信息不可直接观测的空间推理任务时表现不佳，此类问题需要模型从不可见视角推理可见内容、追踪遮挡空间中的路径或整合局部观测为连贯空间表征，而现有方法缺乏有效的中间表征来桥接观测输入与未观测空间结构之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出Imaginative Perception Tokens（IPT），即嵌入在VLM内部的中间感知表征，用于外部化模型在替代空间配置下会感知到的信息，同时保持与观测输入的一致性；以统一VLM BAGEL为骨干网络，设计三项任务（视角推理PET、路径追踪PT、多视角计数MVC）并构建约2万样本的数据集，包含地面真值想象、答案与评估基准，通过IPT监督进行训练。
AI.result: IPT监督持续提升空间推理性能，通常优于文本思维链训练，且无需推理时生成图像；在MVC任务上准确率提升3.4%，在PT任务上与强闭源模型性能相当；将IPT与纯标签监督结合可进一步获益，而文本思维链可能导致性能显著下降，表明将空间计算强制通过语言通道存在模态不匹配问题。
AI.conclusion: IPT为推理未观测空间结构提供了原理性的监督信号，在提升泛化能力的同时产生可解释的中间表征，揭示了空间推理任务中视觉中间表征优于纯语言思维链的关键发现。

title: VidMsg: A Benchmark for Implicit Message Inference in Short Videos
summary: Understanding short online videos involves more than identifying visible objects and actions; video makers often include an underlying message or purpose in the clip. We introduce VidMsg, a benchmark for evaluating implicit message understanding in short, internet-native video clips. VidMsg contains 400 YouTube-derived clips across 9 practical topic areas and 52 fine-grained target messages, covering domains such as career and finance, education, health and well-being, culture, safety, sustainability, and lifestyle. VidMsg is constructed through a message-first pipeline: an LLM first translates target messages into indirect search scenarios, which are used to retrieve candidate clips. Human annotators then retain clips that convey the intended message without being overly explicit. VidMsg is designed primarily for bidirectional message-clip retrieval for scalable applications such as video search and recommendation, where systems must capture holistic video understanding. In addition to retrieval, VidMsg includes a diagnostic multiple-choice QA benchmark, where models select the intended message of a clip from semantically related alternatives. Experiments with contemporary video-language and retrieval models show that strong models often fail on VidMsg, because the task requires pragmatic inference, integration of contextual cues, and discrimination among semantically close messages. We also introduce VidVec-Msg, a baseline method that improves message-oriented retrieval while leaving substantial headroom for future work.

AI.tldr: VidMsg 是一个面向短视频隐式信息理解的双向检索与诊断基准，包含 400 个视频和 52 个细粒度目标信息，实验表明现有视频-语言模型在此任务上表现不佳，VidVec-Msg 基线方法仅实现有限提升，凸显了该方向的巨大挑战与研究空间。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解研究多聚焦于显式的物体与动作识别，忽略了短视频中创作者常嵌入的隐式信息或意图，而现有基准缺乏对这类隐式语义理解能力的系统评估，因此需要构建一个专门针对短视频隐式信息理解与检索的基准。
AI.method: VidMsg 采用信息优先的构建流程：首先使用大语言模型将目标信息翻译为间接检索场景，据此检索候选视频片段；再由人工标注者筛选出能传达目标信息但不过于直白的视频。基准支持双向信息-视频检索任务和多项选择诊断问答任务，其中模型需从语义相近的候选信息中选出目标信息。同时提出了 VidVec-Msg 基线方法以改善面向信息的检索性能。
AI.result: 在 VidMsg 基准上，主流的视频-语言模型和检索模型均表现不佳，因为该任务要求模型具备语用推理能力、跨语境线索整合能力以及对语义相近信息的判别能力。VidVec-Msg 基线方法在信息导向检索上有所改进，但整体性能仍有限，留有显著提升空间。
AI.conclusion: VidMsg 揭示了当前视频理解模型在隐式信息理解上的显著短板，表明仅依靠显式视觉-语言对齐不足以捕获短视频中蕴含的深层意图，为视频搜索、推荐等需要整体视频理解的应用提供了新的挑战性评估基准和未来研究方向。

title: Investigating Adversarial Robustness of Multi-modal Large Language Models
summary: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance on vision-language tasks, but incorporating visual inputs through a vision encoder (e.g., CLIP) substantially expands the attack surface, making these models vulnerable to visual adversarial perturbations. Prior defenses typically preserve compatibility with pretrained MLLMs by enforcing strict alignment to CLIP's original embedding space during adversarial fine-tuning; while practical, this constraint fundamentally limits achievable robustness. We present a systematic investigation of adversarial robustness in MLLMs. We first introduce a diagnostic CLIP-alignment protocol that predicts, prior to full MLLM training, which robust vision encoders will transfer effectively to the multimodal setting, revealing that large-scale multimodal adversarial pretraining, rather than unimodal scale alone, is the critical factor for strong robustness transfer. Integrating such encoders into MLLMs via end-to-end multimodal training yields average gains of 28 CIDEr points on captioning and 11.7% VQA accuracy under strong adversarial attacks compared to constrained plug-and-play baselines. We further show that adversarial training applied directly to a standard non-robust MLLM degrades both clean and adversarial performance, establishing robust visual representations as a strict prerequisite, while end-to-end adversarial training from a robust backbone delivers additional gains of 1.9 CIDEr points and 4.3% VQA accuracy. Beyond training-time defenses, lightweight test-time visual stochastic transformations serve as an effective black-box defense for non-robust MLLMs, elevating adversarial performance from near-zero to levels comparable with robust models. Finally, we show that our robust models substantially reduce toxic generation under white-box visual jailbreak attacks. Code and pretrained weights will be released publicly.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的视觉对抗鲁棒性，发现大规模多模态对抗预训练是鲁棒性有效迁移的关键因素，并提出采用端到端多模态对抗训练结合鲁棒视觉骨干，在强攻击下显著提升了图像描述（+28 CIDEr）和VQA准确率（+11.7%），同时轻量级测试时随机变换可作为非鲁棒MLLM的有效黑盒防御。
AI.motivation: MLLM通过引入视觉编码器（如CLIP）扩展了攻击面，使其易受视觉对抗扰动攻击；现有防御方法通过强制对齐CLIP原始嵌入空间来保持与预训练MLLM的兼容性，但这种约束从根本上限制了可实现的鲁棒性，亟需探索更有效的鲁棒视觉编码器选择和训练策略。
AI.method: 提出一种诊断性CLIP对齐协议，可在完整MLLM训练前预测哪些鲁棒视觉编码器能有效迁移到多模态场景；系统比较了端到端多模态对抗训练与约束型即插即用基线；采用大规模多模态对抗预训练的视觉编码器作为骨干；引入轻量级测试时视觉随机变换作为黑盒防御；评估了白盒视觉越狱攻击下的有毒生成缓解效果。
AI.result: 端到端多模态对抗训练在强攻击下比即插即用基线在图像描述上平均提升28 CIDEr点，VQA准确率提升11.7%；从鲁棒骨干出发的端到端对抗训练额外带来1.9 CIDEr点和4.3% VQA准确率提升；测试时随机变换可将非鲁棒MLLM的对抗性能从近乎零提升至与鲁棒模型相当；鲁棒模型显著减少了白盒视觉越狱攻击下的有毒生成。
AI.conclusion: 大规模多模态对抗预训练而非单模态规模是鲁棒性有效迁移的关键因素；鲁棒视觉表示是MLLM对抗训练的必要前提，直接对非鲁棒MLLM进行对抗训练会同时损害干净和对抗性能；测试时随机变换可作为非鲁棒模型的有效后备防御方案。

title: Beyond False Stability: High-Noise Drift Gating for Test-Time Adversarial Defenses in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP show strong zero-shot generalization but remain highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Adversarial training improves robustness but is computationally expensive, motivating test-time defenses. Recent approaches exploit how CLIP's visual representations respond to stochastic perturbations: aggregating predictions across noisy views, constructing Gaussian noise-averaged anchors and interpolating features toward them, or applying counter-perturbations. These strategies improve robustness but often degrade clean accuracy, yielding an unfavorable clean-robust trade-off. We revisit stochastic test-time defenses and identify an underexplored noise-regime transition in CLIP's representation space. Prior work explored perturbations mainly in the weak-noise regime, where adversarial examples can appear unusually stable (false stability). Our analysis shows this reverses as perturbation strength grows: beyond the weak-noise regime, adversarial representations become markedly more unstable than clean ones, giving a clearer separation signal. The transition is consistent across uniform and Gaussian noise, photometric and geometric transforms, datasets, and diverse attacks. It largely disappears in adversarially trained models, suggesting it is tied to the fragile local-basin geometry of adversarial representations in non-robust CLIP. We propose a training-free, plug-in drift-gated mechanism that uses high-noise feature drift as a lightweight gating signal to trigger existing test-time defenses only when adversarial-like instability is detected. Across 13 datasets it consistently improves the clean-robust trade-off. On eight fine-grained datasets, mean clean+adversarial accuracy rises from 65.7% to 71.4% for counterattack defenses and 68.4% to 73.2% for noise-anchoring; on ImageNet and four shifted variants, from 56.1% to 66.2% and 62.1% to 67.6%.

AI.tldr: 本文发现CLIP视觉表示中存在一个被忽视的噪声区间转变：弱噪声下对抗样本呈现假稳定性，而强噪声下其表示比干净样本更不稳定。基于此提出免训练的漂移门控机制，利用高噪声下的特征漂移作为门控信号触发现有测试时防御，在13个数据集上显著改善了干净精度与鲁棒性之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有针对CLIP的随机测试时防御方法虽然提升了对抗鲁棒性，但往往以牺牲干净样本准确率为代价，面临恶化干净-鲁棒权衡的困境。本文旨在探究CLIP表示空间中对抗样本在不同噪声强度下的行为差异，并据此设计一种无需额外训练即可改善干净-鲁棒权衡的防御策略。
AI.method: 本文首先系统分析CLIP表示空间中的噪声区间转变现象：在弱噪声区域对抗样本表现出异常的稳定性（假稳定性），而当扰动强度超过临界点进入强噪声区域后，对抗表示的不稳定性显著高于干净表示，这一转变在不同噪声类型、变换方式、数据集和攻击方法上均一致成立。基于此发现，本文提出一种免训练、即插即用的漂移门控机制（Drift-Gated Mechanism），将高噪声下的特征漂移量作为轻量级门控信号，仅在检测到类似对抗的不稳定性时才触发现有的测试时防御（如对抗反制或噪声锚定），从而避免对干净样本的不必要干预以保持其准确率。
AI.result: 在13个数据集上的实验表明，该漂移门控机制一致地改善了干净-鲁棒权衡。在8个细粒度数据集上，对抗反攻防御的平均干净+对抗准确率从65.7%提升至71.4%，噪声锚定防御从68.4%提升至73.2%；在ImageNet及其4个分布偏移变体上，对应指标从56.1%提升至66.2%和从62.1%提升至67.6%。此外，该噪声区间转变现象在对抗训练的模型上基本消失，表明其与非鲁棒CLIP中对抗表示脆弱的局部盆地几何结构相关。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了CLIP视觉表示在噪声强度变化下的区间转变特性，指出了一个被先前工作忽视的弱噪声假稳定性陷阱，并证明了强噪声下对抗表示的不稳定性可作为鲁棒检测的有效信号。所提出的漂移门控机制无需训练即可即插即用，显著改善了现有测试时防御的干净-鲁棒权衡，为理解CLIP对抗脆弱性的几何根源提供了新视角，并为构建更实用的视觉语言模型防御方案指明了方向。

title: Beyond Compression: Quantifying Spectral Accessibility in Vision Representations
summary: Vision-language models map visual features into a shared embedding space through learned projection layers, yet it remains unclear how these transformations alter the structure of visual information. This study examines changes in representation through spatial-frequency accessibility, measured by the linear recoverability of band-limited Fourier energy from model representations. To isolate effects beyond dimensionality reduction, we introduce Residual Spectral Loss (RSL), which evaluates changes relative to a dimension-matched random projection baseline. To reduce confounding effects from optimization, the analysis uses pretrained models with all parameters frozen. The experimental results show consistent frequency-dependent changes in accessibility across CLIP and DINOv2 on ImageNet and MS-COCO datasets. Spectral accessibility follows a non-monotonic trajectory across depth, peaking at intermediate layers before decreasing toward the output representation. The final transformation differs across architectures: CLIP's learned projection is spectrally neutral, with changes explained by compression, whereas DINOv2's [CLS] pooling induces a structured loss across the spectrum. These findings identify intermediate layers and pooling mechanisms as primary drivers of spectral transformation in modern vision encoders.

AI.tldr: 本研究引入残差谱损失（RSL）来测量视觉语言模型中表示的空间-频率可访问性变化，发现CLIP和DINOv2中频谱可访问性随深度呈非单调轨迹，且在最终变换中表现出不同的架构特性。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型通过投影层将视觉特征映射到共享嵌入空间，但这些变换如何改变视觉信息的结构尚不清楚，特别是超出维度压缩效应的频谱结构变化未被充分研究。
AI.method: 通过空间-频率可访问性（即从模型表示中线性恢复带限傅里叶能量的程度）来量化表示变换；引入残差谱损失（RSL）以消除维度降低的混淆效应，以维度匹配的随机投影为基线；使用冻结参数的预训练模型以减少优化带来的干扰。
AI.result: 在CLIP和DINOv2上的ImageNet和MS-COCO数据集实验中，频谱可访问性随深度呈非单调变化，在中间层达到峰值后向输出层下降；CLIP的投影层是频谱中性的，其变化可由压缩解释，而DINOv2的[CLS]池化在整个频谱上引入了结构性损失。
AI.conclusion: 中间层和池化机制是现代视觉编码器中频谱变换的主要驱动因素，不同架构（CLIP vs DINOv2）在最终变换中表现出不同的频谱特性。

title: Beyond Encoder Accumulation: Measuring Encoder Roles in Multi-Encoder VLMs
summary: As foundation models scale toward fusing more heterogeneous visual streams, understanding how diverse encoders interact under joint training becomes a prerequisite for principled design. Yet large vision-language models (LVLMs) currently lack the tools to do so, and parameter-efficient encoder configurations remain hard to identify before training. To re-examine encoder roles under joint training, on the 16-benchmark Cambrian-1 suite we retrain and evaluate all 31 non-empty subsets of five common vision encoders under a unified pipeline (~20k GPU-hours total), and report three findings. First, retraining each subset from scratch reveals encoder rankings that differ from those obtained by masking encoders on a fixed checkpoint, including which encoder ranks first overall. Second, we decompose each encoder's contribution into two axes, Capacity, the score an encoder reaches on its own, and Necessity, the drop when it is removed from the full pool. The two axes are not interchangeable. Pairing the two highest-Capacity encoders is suboptimal, while pairing a high-Capacity anchor with an adaptive complement matches the full five-encoder model. Adding further encoders beyond this pair yields only marginal gains. Third, at fixed parameter count, per-encoder pre-projector effective rank explains the residual score variation. The strongest pairs combine an anchor whose rank survives joint training with a complement whose rank expands under it, suggesting that higher-rank, less-collapsed projector inputs correspond to a more favorable optimization regime at the encoder-projector interface. Together, the Capacity-Necessity decomposition and the pre-projector rank analysis, along with comprehensive evaluation through retraining, expose a methodological gap in multi-encoder LVLM design, and offer concrete primitives for closing it.

AI.tldr: 本文通过重新训练31个视觉编码器子集（在Cambrian-1基准上，总计约20K GPU小时），揭示了多编码器LVLM设计中基于固定检查点掩码的评估方法存在方法缺陷，并提出了Capacity-Necessity分解和预投影器有效秩分析两大工具，用以指导编码器组合与优化。
AI.motivation: 当前大型视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）缺乏理解多种异构视觉编码器在联合训练中如何交互的理论工具，且参数高效的编码器配置难以在训练前预先识别，存在方法论上的空白。
AI.method: 论文在Cambrian-1基准套件的16个任务上，对五种常见视觉编码器的全部31个非空子集进行统一流水线的从头重新训练（共计约20K GPU小时），并引入两个分析维度：Capacity（编码器单独达到的分数）和Necessity（从全集移除时分数下降幅度），以及基于预投影器有效秩（effective rank）的分解分析。
AI.result: 重新训练揭示了与基于固定检查点掩码不同的编码器排序结果；Capacity与Necessity两个维度不可互换，两个最高Capacity编码器配对效果次优，而一个高Capacity锚点编码器与一个自适应互补编码器的配对可匹配五编码器全模型性能，超出此配对的额外编码器仅带来边际收益；在固定参数量下，每个编码器的预投影器有效秩能解释残差分数变异，最优配对中锚点编码器秩在联合训练后保持而互补编码器秩扩张。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了多编码器LVLM设计中基于固定检查点掩码的方法论缺陷，提供了Capacity-Necessity分解与预投影器有效秩分析作为可操作的设计原语，指出更高秩、更少坍缩的投影器输入对应更有利的编码器-投影器接口优化机制。

title: CoralBay: A Self-Supervised CT Foundation Model
summary: Self-supervised learning has enabled large-scale pre-training on 2D natural images, producing general-purpose visual representations that transfer effectively across tasks. However, many medical imaging modalities, such as CT scans, are inherently three-dimensional and differ fundamentally from natural images in both structure and semantics. Volumetric modalities capture spatial continuity, organ anatomy, and intensity-based tissue properties (e.g., Hounsfield Units), which are not adequately modeled by 2D pre-training. To bridge this gap, we introduce CoralBay, a self-distillation framework that extends DINO by using a hierarchical 3D Swin backbone and applying self-distillation to concatenated multi-scale features, enabling data-efficient self-supervised learning of rich spatial representations that encode both global semantics and fine-grained local structure. As a result, CoralBay transfers effectively to a wide range of downstream radiological tasks, demonstrating strong and consistent performance across diverse anatomical targets. In addition, we contribute to the open-source \eva framework by introducing a public, reproducible 3D radiology leaderboard that unifies multiple datasets and establishes a standardized benchmark for evaluating volumetric representation learning methods.

AI.tldr: CoralBay是一个基于自蒸馏的3D自监督学习框架，扩展了DINO方法以处理CT等三维医学影像。它采用层次化3D Swin骨干网络并对多尺度特征进行自蒸馏，在多个放射学下游任务上表现优异，同时配套发布了可复现的3D放射学公开榜单。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法主要针对2D自然图像设计，无法有效建模CT等三维医学影像中的空间连续性、器官解剖结构和基于强度的组织属性（如亨氏单位）。亟需一种能够编码全局语义与细粒度局部结构的三维视觉表示学习方法。
AI.method: CoralBay扩展了DINO自蒸馏框架，采用层次化3D Swin Transformer作为骨干网络，通过对拼接的多尺度特征施加自蒸馏约束，实现了数据高效的3D自监督学习。该方法能够同时捕获全局语义信息和精细的局部空间结构。
AI.result: CoralBay在多种下游放射学任务上展现出优异的迁移性能，效果强且一致，覆盖了不同的解剖目标。此外，论文还在eva框架上贡献了一个公开、可复现的3D放射学榜单，统一了多个数据集并建立了标准化的评测基准。
AI.conclusion: CoralBay证明了将自蒸馏与层次化3D Swin骨干结合能有效弥合2D预训练与3D医学影像之间的鸿沟，为三维医学视觉表示学习提供了一种数据高效的方案。开放榜单与标准化基准的建立有助于推动该领域研究的可复现性与公平对比。

title: Electromagnetic Navigation for Femoral Osteotomy Using High-Accuracy X-ray-to-CT Registration
comment: Will be published in the International Journal of Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery
summary: Accurate execution of preoperative plans in corrective femoral osteotomies remains challenging. Current techniques are limited by variable accuracy, invasiveness, and radiation exposure, with free-hand methods and patient-specific instrumentation (PSI) often requiring >30 and >6 fluoroscopic images, respectively. We present an integrated, electromagnetic tracking (EMT)-based navigation system for femoral osteotomies that minimizes dissection and intraoperative fluoroscopy. The system couples CT-based preoperative planning with one-time intraoperative C-arm calibration and accurate X-ray-to-CT registration from two fluoroscopic images acquired at initialization. This enables real-time, fluoroscopy-free EMT navigation of the saw blade and bone fragments relative to the preoperative plan, and is compatible with uniplanar and biplanar osteotomies. In a feasibility study using 18 synthetic femora, EMT guidance significantly outperformed free-hand execution in total angular error ($(3.05 \pm 0.75)^\circ$ vs.\ $(6.32 \pm 2.36)^\circ$, $p=0.031$), assuming the same minimal surgical exposure for both. No EMT-guided trials exceeded the >5° clinical threshold, whereas free-hand produced 4 outliers of 6 trials. The system achieved statistical equivalence ($\pm 2^\circ$, $\pm 2,\text{mm}$) to PSI for total angular ($p \le 0.02$) and total translational ($p=0.048$) errors, with no significant differences in user questionnaire scores. By transferring preoperative plans using only two fluoroscopic images while matching PSI accuracy without additional surgical exposure, the proposed system motivates subsequent cadaveric and clinical validation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于电磁跟踪（EMT）的股骨截骨导航系统，仅需两张术前X光片进行配准，即可实现无荧光透视的实时导航，精度显著优于徒手操作，并与患者专用导向器（PSI）统计等效。
AI.motivation: 矫正性股骨截骨术中术前计划的精确执行仍具挑战，现有技术（徒手操作和患者专用导向器PSI）在精度、创伤和辐射暴露方面存在不足，徒手方法误差大且PSI需大量荧光成像（>6张），亟需一种高精度、低辐射、微创的导航方案。
AI.method: 提出一种集成的电磁跟踪（EMT）导航系统，结合CT术前规划、一次性C臂标定以及基于两张荧光图像的X光-to-CT配准，实现无荧光透视的实时EMT导航，可引导锯片和骨碎片按术前计划移动，兼容单平面和双平面截骨。
AI.result: 在18个合成股骨模型中，EMT导航的总角度误差（3.05±0.75°）显著优于徒手操作（6.32±2.36°，p=0.031），无EMT试验超过5°临床阈值而徒手有4个离群值；EMT与PSI在总角度误差（p≤0.02）和总平移误差（p=0.048）上达到统计等效（±2°，±2 mm），用户问卷评分无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该系统仅需两张荧光图像即可转移术前计划，在无需额外手术暴露的条件下达到与PSI相当的精度，为后续尸体和临床验证提供了有力支持，有望替代传统高辐射、高创伤的导航方式。

title: Benchmarking Visual State Tracking in Multimodal Video Understanding
summary: Understanding a video requires more than recognizing isolated moments, as humans continuously track entities, states, and events over time. This capacity for visual state tracking is fundamental to video understanding, yet remains underexplored in current evaluations of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). We introduce Visual STAte Tracking benchmark (VSTAT), a video-based benchmark designed to diagnose visual state tracking in MLLMs. VSTAT consists of 834 clips drawn from both synthetic and real-world videos, paired with 1,500 questions that cannot be answered from any single frame or short segment, requiring continuous perception and integration of events across the entire video stream. Despite their strong performance on existing video benchmarks, we find that state-of-the-art MLLMs perform far below humans and only modestly above answer-prior baselines. To analyze this gap, we compare MLLMs' thinking traces with the underlying video stream to understand why and when MLLMs fail on VSTAT. We find that MLLMs reason and track correctly in text, but fail at visually perceiving the events they need to track. Finally, our preliminary evaluation suggests that recent agentic approaches, including MLLM-based video agents and coding agents, do not readily resolve these failures, still falling short on VSTAT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VSTAT基准测试，用于诊断多模态大语言模型在视频理解中的视觉状态追踪能力。实验表明，现有最先进的MLLMs在该任务上远低于人类水平，且失败根源在于视觉感知不足而非推理错误，当前智能体方法也无法有效解决这一问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解评估大多聚焦于孤立时刻或短片段识别，缺乏对视觉状态追踪能力的系统性诊断，而这一能力正是人类理解视频的基础。当前多模态大语言模型在现有视频基准上表现强劲，但其对连续事件跨时间感知与整合的真实能力尚不清楚。
AI.method: VSTAT基准包含834个视频片段（涵盖合成与真实场景）及1500道问题，每道问题无法从单一帧或短片段回答，要求模型持续感知并整合整个视频流中的事件。研究通过对比MLLMs的思维链推理轨迹与底层视频流，分析模型在视觉感知与文本推理环节的失败模式，并初步评估了基于MLLM的视频智能体与编码智能体两类智能体方法。
AI.result: 在VSTAT上，最先进的MLLMs表现远低于人类水平，仅略优于基于答案先验的基线。分析发现，MLLMs在文本推理和跟踪推理上表现正确，但失败于对需要跟踪的事件进行视觉感知。初步评估表明，基于MLLM的视频智能体和编码智能体等智能体方法也无法有效解决VSTAT上的失败问题。
AI.conclusion: VSTAT揭示了当前MLLMs在视觉状态跟踪上的根本瓶颈在于视觉感知而非推理，即使引入智能体方法也难以弥补这一缺陷。这为未来MLLMs在视频理解中的视觉感知能力提升指明了关键方向。

title: Demo2Tutorial: From Human Experience to Multimodal Software Tutorials
summary: Human experience in digital environments offers a vast, underexplored resource of authentic, untrimmed interactions that contain rich procedural knowledge. We introduce Demo2Tutorial, a framework that transforms this experience captured via screen recordings and interaction logs into structured, multimodal software tutorials for teaching both humans and agents. Demo2Tutorial first collects human experience via a dedicated recorder, then parses raw experience using a multimodal Action Parser to reconstruct perception, action, and intent. A Step Planner then abstracts these steps into hierarchical task graphs representing goals and steps. Finally, a Tutorial Composer transforms the parsed experience into structured, reusable image-text instructions. We evaluate the tutorial generation quality on a new benchmark derived from official software documentation.
